videos.title: UK | 15th May, Friday - Education Day with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 15th May, Friday - Education Day with Shavez RIFT is redefining the future of automated trading by combining advanced execution systems, AI-assisted infrastructure, and scalable capital management into one powerful ecosystem designed for modern markets.

Built around structure, consistency, and intelligent execution, RIFT is more than just another trading platform — it’s a next-generation participation engine designed to help users access diversified market opportunities across crypto, forex, commodities, and stocks through automated strategy flows and systematic execution models.

At the core of RIFT is a philosophy that separates professional systems from emotional retail trading:
✅ Structure over hype
✅ Consistency over randomness
✅ Scalability over short-term wins
✅ Survivability over reckless risk

Unlike traditional trading environments that rely heavily on emotional decision-making, RIFT focuses on disciplined execution architecture, intelligent capital allocation, and scalable trading systems that operate continuously across global markets.

🔥 WHAT MAKES RIFT DIFFERENT?

RIFT combines multiple execution layers and diversified strategy flows into a unified automated trading ecosystem:

• AlphaFlow
• SmartFlow
• MicroFlow

These flows work together dynamically across multiple asset classes including:
✔ Crypto
✔ Commodities
✔ Forex
✔ Stocks

The system is designed around distributed execution, meaning capital can move efficiently between opportunities rather than relying on a single isolated trade or market condition.

This creates:
✅ Diversified exposure
✅ Smoother execution
✅ Reduced emotional interference
✅ Structured compounding potential
✅ Scalable capital deployment

⚡ AUTOMATED EXECUTION + AI-DRIVEN INFRASTRUCTURE

RIFT’s trading engine operates through a hybrid execution architecture connected to advanced exchange venues and liquidity systems. The infrastructure is designed to support:
• Continuous market participation
• Multi-position execution
• Signal-driven strategies
• Real-time capital allocation
• Scalable liquidity aggregation
• Compounding-based growth models

The platform also emphasizes ongoing evolution toward:
🔹 Greater transparency
🔹 Advanced security layers
🔹 High-frequency trading capabilities
🔹 Smart contract integrations
🔹 Verifiable execution systems
🔹 Progressive decentralization

📈 THE POWER OF COMPOUNDING

One of the most powerful concepts discussed throughout the RIFT ecosystem is compounding and structured capital growth.

Rather than focusing on emotional “all-in” trades or unrealistic overnight expectations, RIFT promotes disciplined participation and long-term consistency.

The goal is not just making profits once —
The goal is building systems capable of sustained participation and scalable growth over time.

💡 BUILT FOR THE NEXT GENERATION OF TRADERS

Financial markets are evolving rapidly.

Today, algorithmic systems and automated execution dominate global trading volume, while emotional retail trading continues to struggle with inconsistency and risk management.

RIFT is positioning itself at the intersection of:
• AI-assisted finance
• Automated execution
• Structured capital frameworks
• Intelligent liquidity systems
• Hybrid decentralized infrastructure

The result is a platform designed to bridge the gap between human participation and system-level execution.

🌍 A COMMUNITY-DRIVEN ECOSYSTEM

RIFT continues to grow through community engagement, educational content, live architecture discussions, and transparent conversations around execution systems, scalability, security, and market structure.

The “RIFT Before You Quit” series is helping traders understand:
✔ Risk architecture
✔ Capital preservation
✔ Compounding psychology
✔ Market structure
✔ Execution discipline
✔ Scaling strategies
✔ Trading behavior and emotional control

This project is not simply about chasing hype —
It’s about understanding how modern systems operate in today’s financial landscape.

🚀 THE FUTURE OF CAPITAL PARTICIPATION

As markets continue shifting toward automation, AI-assisted execution, and structured participation models, platforms like RIFT are exploring what the next evolution of trading infrastructure could look like.

Whether you’re interested in:
• Automated trading systems
• Compounding strategies
• Execution architecture
• Market structure
• AI-powered finance
• Hyperliquid infrastructure
• Diversified trading flows
• Scalable liquidity systems

RIFT offers a unique look into where modern trading technology is heading.

📌 DISCLAIMER:
This video is for educational and informational purposes only and should not be considered financial advice. Always do your own research and understand the risks associated with trading and digital assets. videos.title: Can Chase Dollander develop into the ace he was drafted to be?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can Chase Dollander develop into the ace he was drafted to be? The Rockies have turned into an ethically bad team in 2026– not awful, but not good either. But if Chase Dollander can continue to develop into a top-tier starter in the league it makes a lot of those losses easier to stomach. What would a step forward look like for the Rockies young starter? How concerned are we about the apparent injury he left Thursday’s game with? Christian Saez and Spencer Smith discuss that and more on the DNVR Rockies podcast.

videos.title: Vegas gives CSU no love + the best players going to new Pac-12 & the pantheon of Rams
videos.summary_source_text:
Vegas gives CSU no love + the best players going to new Pac-12 & the pantheon of Rams Justin Michael starts the podcast by talking about Colorado State’s first high school commitment for the 2027 cycle. He then dives into Pac-12 and Mountain West futures, as well as what Las Vegas is saying about the respective teams. Finally, Justin introduces the concept of CSU Football pyramid, which is based off of the NBA Hall of Fame Pyramid made famous by Bill Simmons. Justins talks about why he likes the idea and the types of players he envisions for each level and much more.

Michigan forward Yaxel Lendeborg had a terrific season. Despite being 23 going on 24 years old, could the big wing be a fit next to Cooper Flagg with the Dallas Mavericks? The DLLS Mavs crew dives deep into his game to discuss. Plus, we do our first official mock draft of the season, live on YouTube!

videos.title: Hindi | 15th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 15th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation RIFT is redefining the future of automated trading by combining advanced execution systems, AI-assisted infrastructure, and scalable capital management into one powerful ecosystem designed for modern markets.

Built around structure, consistency, and intelligent execution, RIFT is more than just another trading platform — it’s a next-generation participation engine designed to help users access diversified market opportunities across crypto, forex, commodities, and stocks through automated strategy flows and systematic execution models.

At the core of RIFT is a philosophy that separates professional systems from emotional retail trading:
✅ Structure over hype
✅ Consistency over randomness
✅ Scalability over short-term wins
✅ Survivability over reckless risk

Unlike traditional trading environments that rely heavily on emotional decision-making, RIFT focuses on disciplined execution architecture, intelligent capital allocation, and scalable trading systems that operate continuously across global markets.

🔥 WHAT MAKES RIFT DIFFERENT?

RIFT combines multiple execution layers and diversified strategy flows into a unified automated trading ecosystem:

• AlphaFlow
• SmartFlow
• MicroFlow

These flows work together dynamically across multiple asset classes including:
✔ Crypto
✔ Commodities
✔ Forex
✔ Stocks

The system is designed around distributed execution, meaning capital can move efficiently between opportunities rather than relying on a single isolated trade or market condition.

This creates:
✅ Diversified exposure
✅ Smoother execution
✅ Reduced emotional interference
✅ Structured compounding potential
✅ Scalable capital deployment

⚡ AUTOMATED EXECUTION + AI-DRIVEN INFRASTRUCTURE

RIFT’s trading engine operates through a hybrid execution architecture connected to advanced exchange venues and liquidity systems. The infrastructure is designed to support:
• Continuous market participation
• Multi-position execution
• Signal-driven strategies
• Real-time capital allocation
• Scalable liquidity aggregation
• Compounding-based growth models

The platform also emphasizes ongoing evolution toward:
🔹 Greater transparency
🔹 Advanced security layers
🔹 High-frequency trading capabilities
🔹 Smart contract integrations
🔹 Verifiable execution systems
🔹 Progressive decentralization

📈 THE POWER OF COMPOUNDING

One of the most powerful concepts discussed throughout the RIFT ecosystem is compounding and structured capital growth.

Rather than focusing on emotional “all-in” trades or unrealistic overnight expectations, RIFT promotes disciplined participation and long-term consistency.

The goal is not just making profits once —
The goal is building systems capable of sustained participation and scalable growth over time.

💡 BUILT FOR THE NEXT GENERATION OF TRADERS

Financial markets are evolving rapidly.

Today, algorithmic systems and automated execution dominate global trading volume, while emotional retail trading continues to struggle with inconsistency and risk management.

RIFT is positioning itself at the intersection of:
• AI-assisted finance
• Automated execution
• Structured capital frameworks
• Intelligent liquidity systems
• Hybrid decentralized infrastructure

The result is a platform designed to bridge the gap between human participation and system-level execution.

🌍 A COMMUNITY-DRIVEN ECOSYSTEM

RIFT continues to grow through community engagement, educational content, live architecture discussions, and transparent conversations around execution systems, scalability, security, and market structure.

The “RIFT Before You Quit” series is helping traders understand:
✔ Risk architecture
✔ Capital preservation
✔ Compounding psychology
✔ Market structure
✔ Execution discipline
✔ Scaling strategies
✔ Trading behavior and emotional control

This project is not simply about chasing hype —
It’s about understanding how modern systems operate in today’s financial landscape.

🚀 THE FUTURE OF CAPITAL PARTICIPATION

As markets continue shifting toward automation, AI-assisted execution, and structured participation models, platforms like RIFT are exploring what the next evolution of trading infrastructure could look like.

Whether you’re interested in:
• Automated trading systems
• Compounding strategies
• Execution architecture
• Market structure
• AI-powered finance
• Hyperliquid infrastructure
• Diversified trading flows
• Scalable liquidity systems

RIFT offers a unique look into where modern trading technology is heading.

📌 DISCLAIMER:
This video is for educational and informational purposes only and should not be considered financial advice. Always do your own research and understand the risks associated with trading and digital assets. Build a Local AI Agent OS (Claude + Hermes + OpenClaw) with Mission Control + Infinite Memory

The video introduces Agent OS, a locally hosted “mission control” dashboard that connects and manages multiple AI agents (Claude, Hermes, OpenClaw/OpenClaude) in one operating-system-like interface with chat, session history, agent status, control rooms, skills/plugins, Kanban integration, and analytics. The presenter shows that the system logs every conversation across agents into an Obsidian-based memory layer containing goals, journals, and a personal knowledge base, enabling agents to retain context about the user and business and improve over time. They explain how they built the dashboard in one session by prompting Claude (using a stack like Next.js and Tailwind and a Claude CLI bridge), argue local-first is more private and usable than terminal workflows, and outline a four-layer “Goldie Mission Stack”: intelligence (Claude), execution (OpenClaw), research/orchestration (Hermes), and self (Obsidian). The episode also references community resources, prompts, a 30-day roadmap, and answers setup and architecture questions.

videos.title: Marco D’Amico on Ivan Demidov, Dobes & the Habs’ Momentum Ahead of Game 6 in Montreal | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
Marco D’Amico on Ivan Demidov, Dobes & the Habs’ Momentum Ahead of Game 6 in Montreal | The Sheet Jeff Marek is joined by Marco D’Amico to break down the Montreal Canadiens taking a massive 3-2 series lead over the Buffalo Sabres after a huge Game 5 victory. The two dive into the electric atmosphere expected at the Bell Centre for Game 6, why Montreal’s playoff momentum feels different this year, and how Jakub Dobes has handled the pressure of becoming the Canadiens’ starter during a playoff run. They also discuss Ivan Demidov’s breakout performance, the impact of goaltending coach Marco Marciano, what the Sabres need to change heading into an elimination game, and who could carry the torch before puck drop in Montreal. Plus, Jeff and Marco talk about why Saturday night at the Bell Centre could become one of the defining moments of the NHL playoffs.

videos.title: Microsoft’s New AI Beats Mythos And Shocks OpenAI
videos.summary_source_text:
Microsoft’s New AI Beats Mythos And Shocks OpenAI 👉 Try Higgsfield Supercomputer here: https://higgsfield.ai/s/super-computer-airevolutionx-RpneRv
Microsoft just revealed MDASH, a new AI-powered security system that beat Anthropic’s Mythos Preview and OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 on the CyberGym benchmark. Instead of relying on one giant model, MDASH uses more than one hundred AI agents to find real Windows bugs, including critical flaws now being patched.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
How Microsoft revealed MDASH, its new AI security system
SOURCE: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/
Why MDASH beat Anthropic’s Mythos Preview and OpenAI’s GPT-5.5
SOURCE: https://www.geekwire.com/2026/microsofts-multi-agent-ai-system-tops-anthropics-mythos-on-cybersecurity-benchmark/
How MDASH uses more than one hundred AI agents to find bugs
SOURCE: https://the-decoder.com/microsoft-pits-more-than-100-ai-agents-against-each-other-to-find-windows-vulnerabilities/
How Microsoft’s AI found sixteen Windows vulnerabilities
SOURCE: https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/microsoft-unveils-mdash-its-ai-agent-driven-security-platform-and-its-already-spotted-a-host-of-new-windows-flaws
Why four of the Windows flaws were rated Critical
SOURCE: https://www.helpnetsecurity.com/2026/05/13/microsoft-mdash-agentic-ai-security-system/
How CyberGym tests AI agents on real-world security tasks
SOURCE: https://www.cybergym.io/

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than one benchmark win. Microsoft just showed that a team of AI agents can beat stronger individual models, find real Windows flaws, and push cybersecurity into a faster and more dangerous new phase.

videos.title: McDavid’s Weird Skating Trick
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid’s Weird Skating Trick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Avs, Golden Knights Set to Meet In Western Conference Final | GS Off Ice

videos.title: Are NHL Coaches Getting Fired Too Fast? + Vegas Advances to Conference Final | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Are NHL Coaches Getting Fired Too Fast? + Vegas Advances to Conference Final | DFO Rundown The NHL coaching carousel keeps spinning — and this time, Kris Knoblauch is out in Edmonton.

On today’s episode of the DFO Rundown, we break down the Edmonton Oilers’ decision to fire Knoblauch and examine the growing trend of NHL coaches getting fired after only one or two seasons behind the bench. Are teams becoming too impatient? Is the pressure to win immediately creating impossible expectations for coaches across the league?

We also dive into the Minnesota Wild blowing a 3-1 lead and how Vegas suddenly looks like a legitimate Stanley Cup threat once again. Plus, we preview the upcoming Golden Knights vs Colorado Avalanche matchup and debate whether Vegas is the toughest challenge Colorado has faced so far this postseason.

Other topics covered on today’s show:

Edmonton Oilers coaching change reaction
Kris Knoblauch analysis
Why NHL coaches are lasting shorter than ever
Bruce Cassidy’s potential impact
Minnesota Wild Eliminated
Ducks Eliminated
Montreal Canadiens vs Buffalo Sabres - Game 6

videos.title: How Winning Battles Sparked an EPIC Avalanche Comeback vs Wild | Film Room
videos.summary_source_text:
How Winning Battles Sparked an EPIC Avalanche Comeback vs Wild | Film Room The Colorado Avalanche pulled off an epic 4-3 overtime comeback over the Minnesota Wild in Game 5, erasing a 3-0 deficit to advance to the Western Conference Final in one of the wildest games of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. In this Colorado Avalanche film room, we break down how Parker Kelly, Jack Drury, Nathan MacKinnon, Martin Necas, and Brett Kulak helped turn the series-clinching win by winning races, battles, faceoffs, and the small details that changed everything. Watch as we analyze the Avs’ comeback, overtime winner, and the key plays that powered Colorado past Minnesota and into the next round.

videos.summary_source_text:
Is The Relationship Between The Dallas Stars & Dallas Mavericks Beyond Repair? | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DLLS Diehard and get access to premium content, our Discord channel, discounts on merch, and a free shirt! Sign up here: https://alldlls.com/join-diehard/

We have a special treat for all viewers/listeners to the DLLS Stars Podcast today. Lia Assimakopoulos, the Stars beat writer for the Dallas Morning News, joins us in-studio to talk about all things Dallas Stars, including the team’s disappointing first round playoff exit and all the major off-season topics: Jamie Benn’s future, Jason Robertson’s contract negotiations and much more. Plus, Lia has been at the forefront of the coverage of the major business lawsuit between the NBA’s Dallas Mavericks and the Dallas Stars. We’ll have her provide the latest updates in that story and the future of American Airlines Centers, as the Mavericks are looking to build a new basketball-only arena and the Stars are eyeing building their own hockey arena and entertainment district outside of the Dallas city limits.

videos.title: The position group that’s never been BETTER for Coach Prime & Colorado
videos.summary_source_text:
The position group that’s never been BETTER for Coach Prime & Colorado On today’s DNVR Buffs Podcast, Jake Schwanitz and Scott Procter discuss Coach Prime’s comments on the 2026 Colorado Buffaloes on The Morning Run with Uncle Neely. Coach Prime revealed his feelings on Colorado’s linebackers, a position group that he thinks is the strongest he’s ever coached at LB. The young players that are coming around the mountain when they come, and the star Colorado defender who could see a position change by the time the season comes. The guys also discuss a massive recruiting weekend for Colorado as summer official visits begin. Discussing CBS Sports’ 1-138 college football rankings this summer and much more.

And the truth is... I HAVE gotten 2 separate offers to buy my YouTube channel/brand. One was from a private equity group and one from a major software company.

videos.title: Put 2 Cloves in Your Mouth Tonight.  See What Happens by Morning | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Put 2 Cloves in Your Mouth Tonight.  See What Happens by Morning | Dr. Mandell What happens when you put 2 whole cloves in your mouth before bed? In this video, we explore a fascinating natural nighttime ritual that has been used in traditional wellness practices for generations. Cloves contain powerful naturally occurring compounds, especially eugenol, which create that immediate warming, tingling sensation many people notice almost instantly. But this goes far beyond just taste. Your mouth is one of the body’s most important gateways, filled with nerves, blood vessels, immune activity, enzymes, and a complex oral microbiome that directly influences your daily comfort and wellness. As you sleep, saliva naturally decreases, allowing odor-producing bacteria to thrive, which is one reason so many people wake up with morning breath even after brushing. We also discuss the incredible cephalic phase response, the brain to gut communication pathway where digestion actually begins before food even reaches the stomach. Learn how taste, smell, chewing, saliva, cranial nerve stimulation, oral tissue health, and digestive readiness all work together in ways most people never think about. Cloves have also been traditionally used to support oral freshness and digestive comfort due to their aromatic warming properties. This is not a magic cure, but it is a fascinating way to better understand how quickly your body responds to sensory input and how small natural habits may support wellness. Try this simple experiment tonight and tell us what you noticed by morning.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.summary_source_text:
Montreal Goes Up 3-2 and Golden Knights Eliminate Anaheim ft. Marco D'Amico & Mike Kelly | The Sheet Jeff Marek is joined by Marco D’Amico to break down the Montreal Canadiens taking a commanding 3-2 series lead over the Buffalo Sabres after a massive Game 5 victory, what’s fueling the Canadiens’ playoff push, how the Sabres respond with their season on the line, and the biggest storylines surrounding the series heading into Game 6. Then, Mike Kelly joins the show to dive into the Vegas Golden Knights advancing to the Western Conference Final after eliminating the Anaheim Ducks, Mitch Marner’s outstanding postseason performance and what’s driving his success in Vegas, plus the dominant starts from the Carolina Hurricanes and Colorado Avalanche as both teams continue to look like Stanley Cup contenders. All that and more on another loaded playoff edition of The Sheet with Jeff Marek.

What's Next For The New York Islanders? 2026 Off-Season Plan What's Next For The New York Islanders? 2026 Off-Season Plan
How will The New York Islanders attempt at moving forward and making their team more competitive in 2026-27? How can they bounce back and move back into a playoffs spot after not making the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. I examine the past season, team roster and determine their best plan to improve the team.  We address NHL Trade Rumours regarding New York Islanders trade rumours and how they should proceed on that.  We analyze their 2026 NHL Prospects and deals they may try to make at the draft.  They are in good shape with draft picks in the 2026 NHL Draft.  We discuss the 2026 NHL Draft prospects they could select as well. The Texas Rangers snatched victory from the jaws of defeat Wednesday night, scoring three times in the ninth inning for a 6-5 walk-off win after Arizona had scored three in the top of the inning for a two-run lead. The heroes were two good guys who have struggled — Jake Burger and Danny Jansen. Burger tied the game in the ninth with a single, and Jansen won it with a single on the next pitch. Now, the Rangers head to Houston for the Silver Boot Series, which the Astros have won for nine straight seasons. This year, though, has a different feel to it. Also, it looks like Nathan Eovaldi will pitch in the series finale.

videos.title: Golden Knights Cook The Ducks & Habs Push Sabres To Edge | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Golden Knights Cook The Ducks & Habs Push Sabres To Edge | Daily Faceoff Live Ivan Demidov delivered again as the Montreal Canadiens took a 3-2 series lead over Buffalo, while Jakub Dobes continues to give Montreal confidence between the pipes. We break down Demidov’s breakout performance, the Sabres’ goaltending questions, and what Game 6 could look like.

Plus, the Vegas Golden Knights are headed back to the Western Conference Final after another clutch performance — including a ridiculous Mitch Marner goal. But are the Golden Knights actually the best team left to challenge Colorado, or could this series get out of hand quickly?

We also dive into the Seattle Kraken offseason outlook with major questions surrounding the roster, direction of the franchise, and what absolutely needs to happen this summer after another missed playoff year.

Then, David Quadrelli joins the show for The All 32 to discuss the Sedins’ growing role in Vancouver, how Canucks fans feel about the organization right now, why Ryan Johnson is viewed as the right choice moving forward, and expectations for a massive offseason in Vancouver.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: Mitch Marner The Magician | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Mitch Marner The Magician | Morning Cuppa Hockey Vegas just closed the door on Anaheim... Jonny Lazarus and former NHL defenceman Colby Cohen are live breaking down a wild night of Stanley Cup Playoff hockey — and the coffee is already brewing.

First up — a full recap of Game 6 between the Vegas Golden Knights and the Anaheim Ducks. Vegas advances to the Western Conference Final to face the Colorado Avalanche... and Jonny and Colby break down how the Golden Knights got here, what Mitch Marner's run means for this team, and what to expect when they go up against Nathan MacKinnon and the Avs.

Carolina Hurricanes defenceman Mike Reilly joins the boys to talk about what it feels like to be part of an 8-0 juggernaut... and whether the Canes are the team to beat in the East. 

Next, the legendary Matthew Barnaby is in to break down Game 5 of the Habs/Sabres series — Montreal wins 6-3 and takes a 3-2 series lead... Demidov with his first career playoff goal, Slafkovsky and Suzuki going off, and Buffalo's goaltending situation getting messier by the night. 

Finally, veteran forward James van Riemsdyk gives us his unfiltered take on the entire playoff landscape — what's surprising him, and who he thinks wins it all.

It's a loaded Friday cup. Don't miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

00:00 – Friday playoff edition opens
01:30 – Vegas steamrolls Anaheim early as Mitch Marner takes over Game 6
02:15 – “How is Auston Matthews not watching this, thinking I need out of Toronto?”
03:05 – William Karlsson’s return changes everything for Vegas
04:00 – Colby breaks down Jack Eichel’s complete two-way dominance
05:10 – John Tortorella skips media availability and the Orange County curfew explanation
08:10 – Mitch Marner says Tortorella “brought our swagger back”
09:00 – Is Tortorella officially coaching Vegas next season?
10:00 – Playoff schedule slows down and the guys react to fewer hockey nights
11:35 – Early thoughts on a potential Colorado vs Vegas series
12:35 – Anaheim’s future and why the Ducks are built for long-term success
13:50 – Contract projections for Leo Carlsson and Cutter Gauthier
16:45 – Carolina Hurricane Mike Reilly joins
17:05 – Reilly on the Hurricanes’ long playoff break and staying sharp
18:00 – Does Carolina prefer Montreal or Buffalo in the Conference Final?
18:40 – Hurricanes players blowing up group chats during playoff games
20:00 – James van Riemsdyk summer stories and Minnesota lake life
21:20 – Tony DeAngelo’s role in helping Mike Reilly land in Carolina
24:45 – What makes Rod Brind’Amour’s Hurricanes culture so dominant
28:20 – Reilly explains why Carolina players genuinely love coming to the rink
29:45 – Why a Montreal vs Carolina series could be a stylistic war
30:10 – Mike Reilly talks Minnesota Gophers hockey and Brad Larson’s impact
33:15 – Post-interview reaction and behind-the-scenes MSG stories
34:20 – Anaheim contract debate continues: what are Carlsson and Gauthier worth?
35:40 – Logan Cooley’s deal becomes the benchmark for young NHL stars
38:00 – Connor Bedard, Macklin Celebrini and the future of mega NHL contracts
43:35 – Should superstars take less money to help teams win Cups?
47:20 – Kaprizov’s $17M discussion sparks major salary cap debate
55:20 – Buffalo vs Montreal Game 6 breakdown begins
56:00 – Why sticking with Jakub Dobes changed the game for Montreal
57:00 – Colby questions Tage Thompson’s playoff discipline and Buffalo’s collapse
59:30 – Lane Hutson’s brilliance and Montreal’s power play adjustments
1:03:00 – Panic level rises for Buffalo heading back to Montreal
1:12:45 – James van Riemsdyk joins the show
1:15:00 – JVR on Mitch Marner’s playoff resurgence in Vegas
1:18:20 – Leafs offseason pressure and Auston Matthews speculation
1:22:00 – JVR discusses how NHL contract negotiations have changed
1:26:10 – The future of short-term superstar contracts in the NHL
1:30:30 – JVR on veteran leadership and adapting later in his career
1:35:10 – Final thoughts on conference finals matchups and playoff storylines

The Bump And Crunch Move All Amateur Golfers Need To Learn! #shorts #golf #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

Perfect your takeaway and wrist hinge — too much arm rotation is destroying your swing in the first foot. Eric Cogorno's 2 o'clock fix changes everything.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you. ‬‬

👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
•Takeaway mastery using the exact model Eric breaks down — hands straight back, club right down the toe line, toe in front of the heel
•Why wrist hinge in the golf swing is one of the two non-negotiable keys to staying on plane early — and how most golfers unknowingly eliminate it
•The two most common golf swing faults in the takeaway (too far inside AND too far outside) and the single fix that works for both
•A simple 2 o'clock visual that immediately corrects the club path in your golf drills practice — no guesswork, instant feedback
•How to use the two-rehearsal, one-hit drill with the Swing Coach app or video to lock in a correct, on-plane takeaway for good
•The 30-day half-swing protocol that Eric Cogorno uses with students to permanently rewire the start of the golf swing
•Why rushing to full swing too fast is the reason most golf lessons and range sessions don't stick — and how to avoid that trap

What separates this from a generic takeaway tip is the precision of the prescription: 20 reps, three times a week, half swings only, for a full 30 days — nothing longer until the pattern is locked in. Eric Cogorno built this protocol around the two root causes he sees in 80% of the golfers he works with: excess arm rotation and insufficient wrist hinge in the golf swing, both of which are addressed simultaneously by the 2 o'clock drill. Use the Swing Coach app or down-the-line video to confirm the shaft is riding the toe line on every rep — that feedback loop is what makes the 30-day commitment actually work.

videos.title: What Doctors Rarely Explain About Blood Pressure
videos.summary_source_text:
What Doctors Rarely Explain About Blood Pressure High blood pressure is often treated like the disease itself, but many times it is a sign that something deeper is going on. Medication can be important, especially early on, but that does not mean the root cause should be ignored. More and more evidence points to metabolic dysfunction as a major driver of high blood pressure. When metabolic health improves, blood pressure often improves with it.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

videos.title: 3 things you shouldn't do to improve your bunker play
videos.summary_source_text:
3 things you shouldn't do to improve your bunker play There is one obvious fix, you don't want to miss

I created The BX-1 alongside former Nike club designer Josh Boggs, a winner of 12 Golf Digest “Hot List” awards.

https://improve.shotcraftgolf.com/products/bx1/lp3_rfs_3?utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube&utm_content=CaseyBunker

Let's go over the Top 8 Reasons Amateur Golfers Can Skip Hundreds of Hours of Bunker Practice with the BX1 Wedge

1. **Reduced Setup Complexity**: With the BX-1, there's no need for the complex setup adjustments required for traditional wedges. Amateurs can avoid the need to practice opening the club face, adjusting stances, and hand positions.

2. **Increased Margin for Error**: The BX-1's design provides a larger margin for error. Unlike traditional wedges where even minor setup mistakes lead to disastrous shots, the BX1 allows for more forgiveness on minor errors, reducing the need for extensive practice to achieve precision.

3. **No Face Opening Required**: Traditional wedge play demands opening the face wide open to achieve the correct bounce. This technique takes time and practice to master. The BX-1 already has a built-in bevel, removing the need to adjust the face.

4. **Avoiding Shanks and Blades**: The BX-1 eliminates the risks of shanking or blading the ball due to its forgiving design, while traditional wedges often lead to these issues unless you've practiced extensively.

5. **Consistent Swing Mechanics**: With the BX-1, there’s no need to change your natural swing. Traditional wedges require you to alter your swing mechanics, making it necessary to invest time in practice to consistently make the adjustments.

6. **Faster Learning Curve**: Amateurs can quickly get out of bunkers with minimal practice by using the BX-1. The wedge is designed to perform like a pro’s open-face shot without demanding the same amount of skill or practice time.

7. **Confidence in the Sand**: With the BX-1, you can build confidence quickly because the club is more forgiving. This contrasts with traditional wedges where lack of confidence and fear of making mistakes lead to prolonged practice sessions.

8. **Normal Shot Setup**: The BX-1 allows for a standard shot setup, similar to a fairway shot, which is straightforward and familiar for most golfers, thereby reducing the necessity for special bunker shot practice.

videos.title: Your Collagen Powder Is Doing NOTHING
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Collagen Powder Is Doing NOTHING You’re using collagen wrong. This common collagen mistake could be limiting your results. Discover the benefits of collagen and the best ways to improve collagen absorption for better skin, joints, bones, and more. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/434UguK

0:00 Introduction: The biggest collagen mistake 
1:15 Why collagen is not working
4:58 Collagen for bones 
5:37 Collagen for tendons 
6:47 Collagen for joints and ligaments
9:53 Collagen for fascia 
10:28 Collagen for skin
12:01 How much collagen do you need?

Keep watching for more collagen benefits and ways to boost your intake: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/YKENAzCnZao
▶️ https://youtu.be/jGE_WOalvBc
▶️ https://youtu.be/SHvL0_jvYGs

Collagen won’t work without motion.

If you’re taking collagen but living a sedentary lifestyle, your results will be limited. Prolonged sitting is one of the worst things for your joints.

Most people are deficient in collagen because the modern diet provides very little.

Collagen also requires specific mechanical input to benefit different tissues. Whether you’re supporting bones, tendons, ligaments, or skin, the right types of movement can help maximize collagen absorption and effectiveness.

Your blood vessels are largely made of collagen. Brisk walking, interval training, and nasal breathing can help support vascular health and direct collagen where it’s needed.

Aim for about 15 grams of collagen daily, paired with vitamin C to support absorption. For best results, consume collagen 30 to 60 minutes before exercise.

videos.title: Silex har tredubblats på två veckor: En aktie är aldrig bra eller dålig i sig själv.
videos.summary_source_text:
Silex har tredubblats på två veckor: En aktie är aldrig bra eller dålig i sig själv. Silex har tredubblats på två veckor — från 80 till 240 kronor. Jag pratar normalt inte om enskilda aktier, men det här är ett undantag. För det illustrerar något jag tror många missar.

En aktie är aldrig bra eller dålig i sig själv. Den är bara köpvärd i förhållande till sitt pris — oavsett hur bra bolaget är.

I videon återger jag resonemanget från en analytiker (@vqm.se) vi hade på vår FikaTillsammans igår som kastade ljus på vad som behöver hända i bolaget för att motivera kursen men framförallt hur det är i förhållande till vad ledningen planerar och hur stor sannolikheten för att de ska lyckas är (typ 0.2% sanolikhet). Se det lite som att kika bakom kulisserna på hur en analytiker tänker.

📚 Andrés krönika, se vqm.se och sök på Silex
☕ Mer som detta på Patreon, länk i bio

Viktig information: detta är varken ett köp- eller säljråd. Det är en spegling mellan hur en småsparare och en professionell analytiker tänker. Det är första gången vi nämner Silex. Siffrorna kommer inte från mig utan André Granström som är analytiker på VQM och hans krönika från idag 14 maj om Silex som är öppet tillgänglig för alla. Min dotter äger 15 st Silex aktier.

#privatekonomi #aktier #börsen #investera #värdering #IPO

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: EARLY SMYTHE FAVORITES? Carolina Hurricanes have MULTIPLE Conn Smythe Cases
videos.summary_source_text:
EARLY SMYTHE FAVORITES? Carolina Hurricanes have MULTIPLE Conn Smythe Cases While the Carolina Hurricanes are still waiting for their Eastern Conference Final opponent, let's discuss early Conn Smythe Favorites. Not only do the Hurricanes have a case for the Conn Smythe, but they have four players who are giving reasons they could be favorites. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Frederik Andersen being a Smythe favorite after his brilliant start to the playoffs. Between being 8-0, along with leading the goalies in goals against average, save percentage, and shutout, he's been otherworldly in the crease. After his worst regular season, he's been a brick wall in the crease and is the best goalie in the playoffs by a wide margin. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on why Taylor Hall could be one of the guys to make a case for the Conn Smythe. He's been playing like his MVP-like self from 2018, as he leads the Hurricanes in assists, points, and plus/minus. Furthermore, he's been the catalyst for the hottest line in the playoffs, which has 31 total points combined and a re a plus-25. Finally, Zach shares reasons why Logan Stankoven and Jackson Blake should be considered for the Conn Smythe as well. Stankoven is tied for the playoff lead in goals (7), while scoring four goals in the first four games of the playoffs. Regarding Blake, he had seven points in Round 2, along with the series-clinching goal. Furthermore, his all-around contribution gives him a case to be in the conversation for Playoff MVP. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: xAI Just Dropped Their Claude Code Killer
videos.summary_source_text:
xAI Just Dropped Their Claude Code Killer 🚀 Try Grok Build: https://mrc.fm/xcli

xAI just dropped Grok Build, their answer to Claude Code, and I had to put it to the test so I gave it one prompt and watched it vibe code a fully playable retro arcade game from an empty folder in about five minutes. Then I pushed it further with six parallel subagents building UFOs, power ups, chiptune music, screen effects, a leaderboard and an achievement system all at the same time, ran headless grok -p commands from a second terminal to generate a README on the fly, and tested the polish skill that xAI's own engineers use. The slick Rust built TUI, mouse support, Plan Mode and the fact that it reads your existing CLAUDE.md and MCP setup with zero configuration might genuinely change how I code and at $99 for six months it's half the price of my Claude Max plan. Let me know in the comments what you'd build with it.

6:22 Upgrading with 6 Parallel Sub-Agents
7:46 Testing the Upgraded Gameplay
8:10 Grok -p Programmatic Commands (Readme Generation)
9:30 The /btw (By The Way) Command
10:12 Final Gameplay, Polish & Outro

videos.title: UK | 14th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 14th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation RIFT is redefining the future of automated trading by combining advanced execution systems, AI-assisted infrastructure, and scalable capital management into one powerful ecosystem designed for modern markets.

Built around structure, consistency, and intelligent execution, RIFT is more than just another trading platform — it’s a next-generation participation engine designed to help users access diversified market opportunities across crypto, forex, commodities, and stocks through automated strategy flows and systematic execution models.

At the core of RIFT is a philosophy that separates professional systems from emotional retail trading:
✅ Structure over hype
✅ Consistency over randomness
✅ Scalability over short-term wins
✅ Survivability over reckless risk

Unlike traditional trading environments that rely heavily on emotional decision-making, RIFT focuses on disciplined execution architecture, intelligent capital allocation, and scalable trading systems that operate continuously across global markets.

🔥 WHAT MAKES RIFT DIFFERENT?

RIFT combines multiple execution layers and diversified strategy flows into a unified automated trading ecosystem:

• AlphaFlow
• SmartFlow
• MicroFlow

These flows work together dynamically across multiple asset classes including:
✔ Crypto
✔ Commodities
✔ Forex
✔ Stocks

The system is designed around distributed execution, meaning capital can move efficiently between opportunities rather than relying on a single isolated trade or market condition.

This creates:
✅ Diversified exposure
✅ Smoother execution
✅ Reduced emotional interference
✅ Structured compounding potential
✅ Scalable capital deployment

⚡ AUTOMATED EXECUTION + AI-DRIVEN INFRASTRUCTURE

RIFT’s trading engine operates through a hybrid execution architecture connected to advanced exchange venues and liquidity systems. The infrastructure is designed to support:
• Continuous market participation
• Multi-position execution
• Signal-driven strategies
• Real-time capital allocation
• Scalable liquidity aggregation
• Compounding-based growth models

The platform also emphasizes ongoing evolution toward:
🔹 Greater transparency
🔹 Advanced security layers
🔹 High-frequency trading capabilities
🔹 Smart contract integrations
🔹 Verifiable execution systems
🔹 Progressive decentralization

📈 THE POWER OF COMPOUNDING

One of the most powerful concepts discussed throughout the RIFT ecosystem is compounding and structured capital growth.

Rather than focusing on emotional “all-in” trades or unrealistic overnight expectations, RIFT promotes disciplined participation and long-term consistency.

The goal is not just making profits once —
The goal is building systems capable of sustained participation and scalable growth over time.

💡 BUILT FOR THE NEXT GENERATION OF TRADERS

Financial markets are evolving rapidly.

Today, algorithmic systems and automated execution dominate global trading volume, while emotional retail trading continues to struggle with inconsistency and risk management.

RIFT is positioning itself at the intersection of:
• AI-assisted finance
• Automated execution
• Structured capital frameworks
• Intelligent liquidity systems
• Hybrid decentralized infrastructure

The result is a platform designed to bridge the gap between human participation and system-level execution.

🌍 A COMMUNITY-DRIVEN ECOSYSTEM

RIFT continues to grow through community engagement, educational content, live architecture discussions, and transparent conversations around execution systems, scalability, security, and market structure.

The “RIFT Before You Quit” series is helping traders understand:
✔ Risk architecture
✔ Capital preservation
✔ Compounding psychology
✔ Market structure
✔ Execution discipline
✔ Scaling strategies
✔ Trading behavior and emotional control

This project is not simply about chasing hype —
It’s about understanding how modern systems operate in today’s financial landscape.

🚀 THE FUTURE OF CAPITAL PARTICIPATION

As markets continue shifting toward automation, AI-assisted execution, and structured participation models, platforms like RIFT are exploring what the next evolution of trading infrastructure could look like.

Whether you’re interested in:
• Automated trading systems
• Compounding strategies
• Execution architecture
• Market structure
• AI-powered finance
• Hyperliquid infrastructure
• Diversified trading flows
• Scalable liquidity systems

RIFT offers a unique look into where modern trading technology is heading.

📌 DISCLAIMER:
This video is for educational and informational purposes only and should not be considered financial advice. Always do your own research and understand the risks associated with trading and digital assets. videos.title: 14.5: Slafkovsky stars with historic 3-assist night! 🇸🇰⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
14.5: Slafkovsky stars with historic 3-assist night! 🇸🇰⭐ Juraj Slafkovsky and the Montreal Canadiens cannot be stopped on Thursday night against the Buffalo Sabres! The Canadiens defeat the Sabres 6-3, with Slafkovsky assisting on goals by Cole Caufield, Nick Suzuki and Ivan Demidov to help secure the victory. This is Slafkovsky's 2nd 3-point game of these Stanley Cup Playoffs, making him the 6th Canadien over the past 40 years - and the 1st since Michael Cammalleri (2 3-point games in 2010) - to register multiple 3-point games in a single postseason. Slafkovsky's incredible display of passing prowess earns him both 2nd star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: Hindi | 14th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 14th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation RIFT is redefining the future of automated trading by combining advanced execution systems, AI-assisted infrastructure, and scalable capital management into one powerful ecosystem designed for modern markets.

Built around structure, consistency, and intelligent execution, RIFT is more than just another trading platform — it’s a next-generation participation engine designed to help users access diversified market opportunities across crypto, forex, commodities, and stocks through automated strategy flows and systematic execution models.

At the core of RIFT is a philosophy that separates professional systems from emotional retail trading:
✅ Structure over hype
✅ Consistency over randomness
✅ Scalability over short-term wins
✅ Survivability over reckless risk

Unlike traditional trading environments that rely heavily on emotional decision-making, RIFT focuses on disciplined execution architecture, intelligent capital allocation, and scalable trading systems that operate continuously across global markets.

🔥 WHAT MAKES RIFT DIFFERENT?

RIFT combines multiple execution layers and diversified strategy flows into a unified automated trading ecosystem:

• AlphaFlow
• SmartFlow
• MicroFlow

These flows work together dynamically across multiple asset classes including:
✔ Crypto
✔ Commodities
✔ Forex
✔ Stocks

The system is designed around distributed execution, meaning capital can move efficiently between opportunities rather than relying on a single isolated trade or market condition.

This creates:
✅ Diversified exposure
✅ Smoother execution
✅ Reduced emotional interference
✅ Structured compounding potential
✅ Scalable capital deployment

⚡ AUTOMATED EXECUTION + AI-DRIVEN INFRASTRUCTURE

RIFT’s trading engine operates through a hybrid execution architecture connected to advanced exchange venues and liquidity systems. The infrastructure is designed to support:
• Continuous market participation
• Multi-position execution
• Signal-driven strategies
• Real-time capital allocation
• Scalable liquidity aggregation
• Compounding-based growth models

The platform also emphasizes ongoing evolution toward:
🔹 Greater transparency
🔹 Advanced security layers
🔹 High-frequency trading capabilities
🔹 Smart contract integrations
🔹 Verifiable execution systems
🔹 Progressive decentralization

📈 THE POWER OF COMPOUNDING

One of the most powerful concepts discussed throughout the RIFT ecosystem is compounding and structured capital growth.

Rather than focusing on emotional “all-in” trades or unrealistic overnight expectations, RIFT promotes disciplined participation and long-term consistency.

The goal is not just making profits once —
The goal is building systems capable of sustained participation and scalable growth over time.

💡 BUILT FOR THE NEXT GENERATION OF TRADERS

Financial markets are evolving rapidly.

Today, algorithmic systems and automated execution dominate global trading volume, while emotional retail trading continues to struggle with inconsistency and risk management.

RIFT is positioning itself at the intersection of:
• AI-assisted finance
• Automated execution
• Structured capital frameworks
• Intelligent liquidity systems
• Hybrid decentralized infrastructure

The result is a platform designed to bridge the gap between human participation and system-level execution.

🌍 A COMMUNITY-DRIVEN ECOSYSTEM

RIFT continues to grow through community engagement, educational content, live architecture discussions, and transparent conversations around execution systems, scalability, security, and market structure.

The “RIFT Before You Quit” series is helping traders understand:
✔ Risk architecture
✔ Capital preservation
✔ Compounding psychology
✔ Market structure
✔ Execution discipline
✔ Scaling strategies
✔ Trading behavior and emotional control

This project is not simply about chasing hype —
It’s about understanding how modern systems operate in today’s financial landscape.

🚀 THE FUTURE OF CAPITAL PARTICIPATION

As markets continue shifting toward automation, AI-assisted execution, and structured participation models, platforms like RIFT are exploring what the next evolution of trading infrastructure could look like.

Whether you’re interested in:
• Automated trading systems
• Compounding strategies
• Execution architecture
• Market structure
• AI-powered finance
• Hyperliquid infrastructure
• Diversified trading flows
• Scalable liquidity systems

RIFT offers a unique look into where modern trading technology is heading.

💡 BUILT FOR THE NEXT GENERATION OF TRADERS

Financial markets are evolving rapidly.

Today, algorithmic systems and automated execution dominate global trading volume, while emotional retail trading continues to struggle with inconsistency and risk management.

RIFT is positioning itself at the intersection of:
• AI-assisted finance
• Automated execution
• Structured capital frameworks
• Intelligent liquidity systems
• Hybrid decentralized infrastructure

The result is a platform designed to bridge the gap between human participation and system-level execution.

🌍 A COMMUNITY-DRIVEN ECOSYSTEM

RIFT continues to grow through community engagement, educational content, live architecture discussions, and transparent conversations around execution systems, scalability, security, and market structure.

The “RIFT Before You Quit” series is helping traders understand:
✔ Risk architecture
✔ Capital preservation
✔ Compounding psychology
✔ Market structure
✔ Execution discipline
✔ Scaling strategies
✔ Trading behavior and emotional control

This project is not simply about chasing hype —
It’s about understanding how modern systems operate in today’s financial landscape.

🚀 THE FUTURE OF CAPITAL PARTICIPATION

As markets continue shifting toward automation, AI-assisted execution, and structured participation models, platforms like RIFT are exploring what the next evolution of trading infrastructure could look like.

Whether you’re interested in:
• Automated trading systems
• Compounding strategies
• Execution architecture
• Market structure
• AI-powered finance
• Hyperliquid infrastructure
• Diversified trading flows
• Scalable liquidity systems

RIFT offers a unique look into where modern trading technology is heading.

📌 DISCLAIMER:
This video is for educational and informational purposes only and should not be considered financial advice. Always do your own research and understand the risks associated with trading and digital assets.

videos.title: How the Broncos’ 2026 Draft Class Stacks Up Against the rest of the AFC West
videos.summary_source_text:
How the Broncos’ 2026 Draft Class Stacks Up Against the rest of the AFC West With the 2026 NFL Draft officially in the books, we look at how George Paton and Sean Payton’s haul compares to the rest of the AFC West. 
Today on the DNVR Draft podcast, we are handing out draft grades for every team in the division while identifying the best and worst picks from the Chiefs, Raiders, and Chargers. We take a look at the "Broncos Crossover" prospects too. 
The crew also moves round-by-round to name our favorite picks from across the division, highlighting the standout first-rounders and the hidden gems found on Day 3. 
How does the Broncos class with Jaylen Waddle stack up against the rest of the West? And why Chiefs 6th overall pick reminds Dre about Jahdae Barron.

videos.title: The Left Shoulder Move You Need #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Left Shoulder Move You Need #golfswing #golftips The most underrated body part that impacts your ball striking is the left shoulder. Feel this - in the backswing, it moves down. In transition, it moves down again. Then through impact, it works up and around. That simple “down-down-up” motion helps you compress your irons, strike it pure, and control power and accuracy like a tour player.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. The most underrated body part that impacts your ball striking is the left shoulder. Feel this - in the backswing, it moves down. NFL Schedule Release Special: Breaking down the Denver Broncos' 2026 schedule The Denver Broncos’ 2026 NFL schedule is here — and we’re breaking down every major matchup, primetime game, road trip, divisional showdown and playoff-impact stretch.
On the DNVR Broncos Podcast, Zac Stevens and Henry Chisholm dive into the full Broncos schedule, including key AFC West games against the Kansas City Chiefs, Las Vegas Raiders and Los Angeles Chargers, plus major matchups against the Buffalo Bills, Pittsburgh Steelers, Los Angeles Rams, Seattle Seahawks and more.
We discuss the toughest parts of Denver’s 2026 schedule, the biggest must-win games, potential trap games, the most exciting home games at Empower Field at Mile High and what the schedule means for Bo Nix, Sean Payton and the Broncos’ playoff hopes.
Drop your record prediction for the Broncos in the comments!

videos.title: Oilers' Next Coaching Options After Knoblauch | Real Kyper & Bourne
videos.summary_source_text:
Oilers' Next Coaching Options After Knoblauch | Real Kyper & Bourne Nick Kypreos, Justin Bourne, and Sam McKee react to the news that the Edmonton Oilers have fired head coach Kris Knoblauch and the Vancouver Canucks have announced their new front office hires. Then, Oilers Now's Bob Stauffer comes on to discuss what led to the decision to fire Knoblauch. Next, former NHLer Chris Wideman joins to chat about Lane Hutson's development. Later, Avalanche beat writer Aarif Dean stops by to talk about how Colorado was able to come back to win Game 5 and the series.

videos.title: Sidney Crosby Puck Protection
videos.summary_source_text:
Sidney Crosby Puck Protection The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Can Christian Braun Bounce Back For the Denver Nuggets in 2027?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can Christian Braun Bounce Back For the Denver Nuggets in 2027? Christian Braun had a tumultuous season in the final year of his rookie deal. After signing a 5 year, $125 million extension, CB shot poorly before eventually tearing 3 ligaments in his foot. How much of his slump for the Denver Nuggets should be attributed to his injury? And was he the scapegoat for the Nuggets this season? The DNVR Nuggets discuss what his future could look like in Denver and what things he should work on to improve.

videos.title: Draft Year, Team Meals & Rangers Life with Alexander Bilecki | Beyond the Crest
videos.summary_source_text:
Draft Year, Team Meals & Rangers Life with Alexander Bilecki | Beyond the Crest What does it take to feed one of the OHL’s top teams? Jeff Marek joins Kitchener Rangers defenseman Alexander Bilecki for a trip to Superstore as they shop for a team meal and get into everything from favorite foods and team personalities to life in junior hockey and navigating a draft year. Along the way, Bilecki shares stories about the Rangers dressing room, the biggest eaters on the team, team traditions, and what it's like being part of a talented Kitchener group with big expectations. From potatoes and pasta to desserts and laughs, this episode gives you a different side of life away from the rink and inside the culture surrounding the Kitchener Rangers.

Subscribe for more episodes of Beyond the Crest and exclusive stories from inside the world of junior hockey.

videos.title: My Favorite AI Model Right Now
videos.summary_source_text:
My Favorite AI Model Right Now I'm always being asked to pick my favorite AI model, but the truth is my favorite changes all the time based on what's out there.

At the moment, GPT-5.5 is probably my go-to for almost everything like coding, brainstorming, and general questions.

But a month ago I probably would’ve said Claude Opus, and before that I really liked Gemini.
Same thing with image models. Right now I’m loving GPT-Images 2.0, especially for prompts with text. But Nano Banana 2 was the frontrunner for a while.

Curious what everyone else is using right now. If you could only choose ONE AI model to keep, which one would it be?

#AI #aimodels I'm always being asked to pick my favorite AI model, but the truth is my favorite changes all the time based on what's out there.

videos.summary_source_text:
Hellebuyck Rumours, Coaching Searches & Draft Trade Buzz | DFO Rundown Insider Edition The playoffs are approaching the halfway point, but the NHL's offseason drama is already in FULL swing. On this episode of DFO Rundown Insider Edition, Irfaan Gaffar and David Pagnotta break down the Oilers firing Kris Knoblauch, why Bruce Cassidy is the name everyone’s watching, and what massive roster changes could still be coming in Edmonton. They also dive into the Maple Leafs’ coaching search, Morgan Rielly trade chatter, and why Toronto’s blue line could look very different next season.

Plus, the guys discuss the Vancouver Canucks’ front office overhaul with Ryan Johnson and the Sedins taking over key roles, the growing Connor Hellebuyck speculation around the league, goalie carousel rumours involving Jordan Binnington and Sergei Bobrovsky, and which teams could make aggressive moves ahead of the NHL Draft. NHL insider news, trade rumours, coaching updates, and offseason chaos, it’s all here.

🏒 Oilers coaching search begins after Kris Knoblauch firing
🍁 Maple Leafs coaching search and Morgan Rielly trade chatter
🐋 Vancouver Canucks front office overhaul with the Sedins & Ryan Johnson
📊 NHL Draft trade buzz involving San Jose, Calgary & Chicago
🔄 Connor Hellebuyck speculation and the NHL goalie carousel
🥅 Jordan Binnington, Sergei Bobrovsky & goalie market rumours
⭐ Teams searching for major roster upgrades ahead of free agency

Baldy on Broncos vs Chiefs Week 1, How The Broncos Schedule SHOULD Look in 2026-27 + More Brian Baldinger joins the DNVR Broncos Podcast to break down the Denver Broncos vs. Kansas City Chiefs Week 1 Monday Night Football opener at Arrowhead, what Bo Nix and Sean Payton must do to steal an early AFC West win, and why this is one of the biggest games on the 2026 NFL schedule. The guys also react to the 2026 NFL schedule release, debate how the Broncos’ 2026-27 slate should look with Denver back in the primetime conversation, and discuss how many national TV games this team deserves after winning the AFC West at 14-3. Plus, with Bo Nix expected to be full speed by training camp, Baldy shares his latest thoughts on Denver’s roster, key contract decisions, and why the Broncos have the talent to stay in the AFC race all season long.

videos.title: Don’t Push, Collapse Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Push, Collapse Instead Most players think speed comes from pushing harder but that actually slows you down. If you want to reach your true top speed, you need to let your ankle collapse so your body naturally spirals at a 45° angle, creating effortless acceleration without a heavy, tension filled push. This is how the fastest NHL skaters generate speed with less effort.

Almost no one is taught the proper mechanics behind skating speed. But you can learn it inside the Downhill Skating System.

In this exclusive interview, we dive deep into the new Titleist GTS2, GTS3, and GTS4 drivers to uncover the real performance changes behind the latest Titleist driver release.

The new 2026 Titleist GTS drivers have already debuted on professional tours, replacing the incredibly popular 2024 GT series. Early testing and player feedback suggest the new models deliver faster ball speeds, improved stability, more forgiveness, increased swing speed potential, and better overall driver performance.

But what actually changed inside the new Titleist GTS driver design? And why are tour players already switching to the brand new driver.

In this video, the engineer and doctor behind the NEW Titleist GTS driver technology explains the biggest differences between the GT and GTS drivers, why golfers are seeing faster clubhead speed, how the GTS2, GTS3, and GTS4 compare, which model could suit your golf swing, and what everyone missed about the new Titleist driver.

videos.title: DARK SPOTS? Do This Before Bed | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
DARK SPOTS? Do This Before Bed | Dr. Mandell Dark spots, uneven skin tone, post-acne marks, and stubborn hyperpigmentation can be incredibly frustrating, especially when expensive creams and treatments don’t seem to give you the results you’re hoping for. In this video, I share a simple 3 ingredient skin support mask you can make at home using 1 tablespoon of plain unsweetened yogurt, regular, low-fat, full-fat, or plain Greek yogurt, a tiny pinch of turmeric, and a few drops of raw honey. Mix these into a smooth paste, apply directly onto the darker spots or uneven pigmented areas, leave it on for 15 to 20 minutes, then rinse gently with lukewarm water. This may help support healthier-looking skin because yogurt contains naturally occurring lactic acid that supports healthy surface skin renewal, turmeric contains curcumin and antioxidant compounds that may help calm inflammatory stress in the skin, and honey helps hydrate and support the skin barrier. I also talk about why what you do from the inside matters just as much, especially when it comes to oxidative stress and pigmentation. Vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that helps support collagen production, skin repair, and may help support healthier pigment balance over time. Great food sources of vitamin C include oranges, grapefruit, lemons, strawberries, kiwi, pineapple, papaya, bell peppers, broccoli, Brussels sprouts, tomatoes, and many leafy greens. Remember, dark spots are often influenced by inflammation, irritation, sun exposure, and skin stress, so protecting your skin and being consistent matters. Let me know in the comments if you try this and what changes you notice.

It sounds crazy, but your teeth are not dead. They’re living structures that are constantly breaking down and rebuilding through a process called remineralization.

In this video, we uncover the real cause of tooth decay and what you can do to support your teeth naturally.

Refined carbohydrates feed harmful bacteria in your mouth. These microbes produce acid that slowly dissolves your enamel, leading to cavities.

And it gets worse at night… If you go to bed without brushing, that layer of carbs sits on your teeth for hours, accelerating damage while you sleep.

videos.summary_source_text:
👍 Healthy nut bread! NO flour, NO sugar, NO yeast. Gluten-Free Bread. 👍 Healthy nut bread! NO flour, NO sugar, NO yeast. Gluten-Free Bread. Healthy and wholesome bread recipe for the whole family. Delicious and easy to make.

3 eggs.
1 cup (240 ml) kefir.
1 cup (150 g) almonds. 1/2 cup (80 g) walnuts.
1/4 cup (50 g) sunflower seeds.
Sweet paprika powder.
1/4 cup (50 g) psyllium husk. Salt.
Garlic powder.
Ground black pepper.
Let the dough rest for 2 hours.
Olive oil.
Sesame seeds.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 60 minutes.

videos.title: Why your wedges don’t spin like they used to #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why your wedges don’t spin like they used to #golfswing #golftips Wedge spin is created by friction between the face and the ball, and that friction reduces as grooves wear over time. Moisture and dirt on the face lower it even further, leading to shots that release more than expected. Understanding groove wear — often around 75 rounds, as suggested by Titleist — and keeping wedges clean and dry can immediately improve control.
If wedge spin or stopping power is holding your scoring back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans help you combine sound technique with equipment awareness for more predictable short-game results.

In this video, I break down EXACTLY what's confirmed, what's rumor, and what's flat-out impossible when it comes to Claude on the iPhone 18 — including why the most viral version of this story can't physically be true.

videos.title: ChatGPT VS Claude - The Ultimate Test
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT VS Claude - The Ultimate Test *Get the Claude guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/x8zb

I go step by step to show how I compare ChatGPT GPT 5.5 and Claude 4.7 Opus across real tasks.

I test ChatGPT vs Claude with coding, writing, landing page copy, data analysis, video planning, business strategy, teaching, website copy, code debugging, and app features.

I use Google Gemini as the judge so I am not the one picking the winner. Gemini scores each AI model from 1 to 10, then I add up the results.

This AI model comparison helps show where Claude is better, where ChatGPT is better, and which AI chatbot may be best for your daily work.

Claude does very well with writing, design, landing pages, dashboards, teaching, and clear business-ready outputs. ChatGPT does better in some strategy, debugging, and feature tests. ChatGPT also has more tools, like image generation and custom GPTs.

If you are trying to choose between ChatGPT and Claude, this video gives you a simple look at how both AI tools work in real examples. I also share a free Claude guide to help you get better results with Claude.

smart sunglasses that quietly convinced him he was the messiah.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, we break down the powerful effects of B12 on your brain, nerves, energy, and overall health, and why this essential vitamin plays a critical role in how you feel every day.

Vitamin B12 is essential for your brain and nerve health, and low levels can lead to fatigue, cognitive issues, and even nerve-related symptoms.

It also plays a key role in preventing certain types of anemia by helping your body transport oxygen to your brain and muscles.
