videos.title: The Best Anti-Aging Advice I Wish I Knew
videos.summary_source_text:
The Best Anti-Aging Advice I Wish I Knew I wish I knew these anti-aging secrets in my 40s! Find out how to look younger, feel healthier, and slow aging naturally with these powerful anti-aging tips.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4eI2CQi

0:00 Introduction: Anti-aging secrets
0:47 Glycine deficiency explained
2:14 Glycine benefits and function
6:29 Glycine benefits and aging 
8:10 Glycine and gut health 
9:36 The best anti-aging advice

Keep watching for more collagen benefits and anti-aging tips:
▶️ https://youtu.be/jGE_WOalvBc
▶️ https://youtu.be/nUYo0fGfZjM
▶️ https://youtu.be/tmqUqdNmu6s

Most people don’t know about this powerful anti-aging secret.

Glycine is classified as a non-essential amino acid because the body can make it, but many people are still deficient. Most glycine in the diet comes from collagen, yet modern diets provide very little.

An ancestral diet included nose-to-tail eating with plenty of collagen, while today most people eat only lean, tender muscle meats. As a result, a large percentage of adults have chronically low glycine levels.

Glycine plays a critical role in red blood cell health, DNA and RNA production, bile salts, and glutathione, one of the body’s most important antioxidants. Your body prioritizes these essential functions first, which means other areas can become depleted.

Glycine is also vital for the immune system and quality sleep. When levels are low, your skin may not get enough support, contributing to visible aging. It also impacts fascia, tendons, cartilage, arteries, and the gut lining.

You don’t necessarily need a glycine supplement; just focus on increasing collagen intake instead. Add collagen to your coffee or a shake, and pair it with vitamin C to support absorption.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions

• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

It’s time for a luxurious (and LARGE) SUV showdown! 

We’ve got Mat in a Rolls-Royce Cullinan, and it’s going head-to-head against a Cadillac Escalade! The question is, which will come out on top - America, or Britain? Let’s take a closer look. 

The Rolls-Royce Cullinan is powered by a 6.75-litre twin-turbo V12 that delivers 570hp and 850Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels, and it’s mighty heavy, weighing in at 2,660kg!

However, that’s still lightweight compared to the Escalade, which tops out at 2,820kg! However, it’s much more powerful than the Cullinan, with the 6.2-litre supercharged V8 delivering 690hp and 885Nm! 

What’s more, we also have a special guest joining us for the end of this video, and it might just put both these cars to shame! Keep watching to see which special guest is set to join us!

videos.title: Biggest Takeaways from Round 1 & 2 for the Carolina Hurricanes ft. Ryan Henkel
videos.summary_source_text:
Biggest Takeaways from Round 1 & 2 for the Carolina Hurricanes ft. Ryan Henkel As we wait for the Carolina Hurricanes' next opponent in the Eastern Conference Final, let's talk about the first two rounds of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. Ryan Henkel of The Hockey News joins to give his thoughts on Round 1 & 2, plus what he's looking for in the ECF for the Hurricanes. On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach & Ryan begin the show by discussing what's been the biggest takeaway for them so far through eight games. From the goaltending to the penalty kill to the dominance of the second line, the Hurricanes are on a historic run. What has helped get them there? Secondly, the guys discuss what they hope to see moving forward from certain guys as they prepare for the ECF. What has stood out, and who needs to step up? What are they looking for for the Hurricanes to be successful in the ECF to punch their ticket to the Stanley Cup Final for the first time since 2006? Finally, the guys give their thoughts on how the Hurricanes are being looked at, even with their current run. While Zach shared his thoughts on Tuesday's show, what does Ryan think overall about everything surrounding the Canes? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 13th May, Wednesday - Episode 6: Scaling, Compounding and Managed Custody Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 13th May, Wednesday - Episode 6: Scaling, Compounding and Managed Custody Explained In Episode 6 of RIFT Before You Quit, the discussion moves beyond trading profits and into the real challenge: scaling capital without destroying the structure behind it.

This session breaks down why most retail traders never successfully scale, how professional systems think differently, and why survivability matters more than emotional wins. The episode also includes a full walkthrough of the RIFT Auto Trading Engine architecture, including custody flow, execution pools, compounding cycles, withdrawals, reconciliation, and future security upgrades.

Topics Covered in Episode 6
Why most traders fail structurally
The difference between small-account success vs scalable systems
Why scaling changes psychology, risk, and execution discipline
Retail trading vs institutional capital systems
The importance of survivability and capital preservation
How professional funds structure exposure and risk
Drawdown mathematics and recovery realities
Why compounding changes everything
The “1% compounding” concept explained
Why emotional execution destroys good systems
The role of automation and algorithmic execution in modern markets
Why over 70% of market activity is algorithmically influenced
Why structure beats prediction
RIFT Auto Trading Engine Architecture Breakdown

This episode also dives deep into the backend structure of the RIFT system, including:

User Wallet Layer
Self-custodial EOA wallet structure
User-controlled deposits and withdrawals
Identity and account mapping
Relay Routing Layer
Stateless routing architecture
Allocation tagging
Internal accounting signals
Strategy distribution across AlphaFlow, SmartFlow, and MicroFlow
Execution Pool
Aggregated capital execution
Liquidity provisioning
Trade funding
Strategy allocation
Capital efficiency through pooled execution
Trading Engine
Off-chain execution systems
AI signal injection
Position management
Risk control
P&L tracking
Compounding logic
Exchange Venue Layer
Hyperliquid integration
Hybrid DEX architecture
Order matching and liquidity access
Settlement and execution routing
Future centralized exchange integrations
Key Concepts Discussed
Managed custody vs self-custody
Why withdrawals occur at cycle boundaries
Capital reconciliation mechanics
Why instant withdrawals can create slippage and forced liquidation risks
How pooled liquidity improves execution quality
Why the system aggregates flows instead of assigning fixed strategies
How reinvestment cycles compound capital growth
Why scalability depends on market liquidity depth, not just TVL
Security & Future Roadmap

The session also outlines upcoming enhancements including:

Multi-signature controls
Time-lock mechanisms
Public transparency layers
On-chain accounting
Verifiable execution stats
Smart contract vault systems
Progressive decentralization roadmap
High-frequency trading infrastructure expansion
Episode 7 Preview

Next episode topics include:

Fear vs greed cycles
Revenge trading mechanics
Dopamine loops in trading
Why traders self-sabotage compounding
Emotional execution vs disciplined systems
Behavioral finance breakdowns

This episode is focused on understanding the difference between:

Winning trades occasionally
vs
Building a structure that survives and compounds over time.

If you’re trying to understand how professional systems think about execution, capital preservation, scaling, liquidity, and automated trading infrastructure, this is one of the most detailed RIFT sessions so far. videos.title: Avalanche Complete INCREDIBLE Comeback to Advance to the Western Conference Finals!
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Complete INCREDIBLE Comeback to Advance to the Western Conference Finals! Colorado Avalanche stun Minnesota Wild with a historic comeback, capped by Brett Kulak’s unexpected overtime heroics. Is another Stanley Cup bid taking shape in Denver?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s incredible rally from a 3-0 deficit, spotlighting Nathan MacKinnon’s pinpoint goal, Scott Wedgewood’s clutch goaltending, and Kulak’s series-winning finish. The hosts dissect pivotal coaching decisions, goaltender switches, and the Avalanche’s never-say-die mentality that leaves fans and analysts buzzing. Key segments cover Cale Makar’s nagging injury concerns, Martin Nečas’s playmaking, and how the Avalanche’s resilience could fuel their run to the Western Conference Finals. Listener reactions, penalty calls, and the impact of Colorado’s gritty depth players round out this must-hear analysis.

Are the Avalanche now the team to beat in the West? Locked On Avalanche unpacks every angle of this playoff thriller.

videos.title: Hindi | 13th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 13th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading.

videos.title: I'm Vibe Coding My YouTube Studio Live
videos.summary_source_text:
I'm Vibe Coding My YouTube Studio Live 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

I've been vibe coding AI agents for months and today I'm pointing the same energy at my own studio. Sony FX30, OBS and a setup that's quietly broken in about six different ways. I'm opening Claude Code live and rebuilding the whole thing on camera. No script, no edits, just me figuring out what works in real time. Come hang out, heckle me in chat, and tell me what to fix next.

videos.title: Better Rotation = Better Striking #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text: Better Rotation = Better Striking #golfswing #golftips She was struggling with rotation because both her head and body were staying too still in the backswing. By learning to turn through the ribcage, her shoulder rotation improved and she found a much better position at the top. Allowing a small amount of head movement freed the body up and created a stronger, more athletic turn. This led to better compression, straighter ball flight, and far more consistent strikes. Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. She was struggling with rotation because both her head and body were staying too still in the backswing. videos.title: Can a YouTube golfer contend on the PGA TOUR?!
videos.summary_source_text:
Can a YouTube golfer contend on the PGA TOUR?! “More Than Qualified” follows Ryan Ruffels’ untraditional journey back to the PGA TOUR. After winning The Q, a creator-led qualifier event with @PlayGolfMyrtleBeach, the former TOUR pro turned YouTuber earned his spot at the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic. All week, Ruffels was followed by PGA Studios film crews to document his mental and physical preparation for his return. The documentary provides unprecedented access, featuring Ruffels mic’d up during every competitive round of the ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic at The Dunes Golf and Beach Club. Can a YouTuber contend on the PGA TOUR? Let’s find out.

videos.title: How to Saucer Pass The Puck
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Saucer Pass The Puck The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: OpenAI CHAOS Exposed In Leaked Texts At Trial
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI CHAOS Exposed In Leaked Texts At Trial Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati's texts to Sam Altman when he was briefly fired from OpenAI was by far the biggest bombshell to come out of the Musk vs Altman trial so far.

For context: When Sam Altman was suddenly ousted from OpenAI in 2023 and rehired a few days later, the public story made it sound almost strategic and calculated.

These texts between Altman and Murati revealed the opposite. 

They showed all the confusion and panic happening behind the scenes and how Satya Nadella, Microsoft's CEO, was pulled in to basically mediate the whole mess.

All in all, not a good look for OpenAI or Sam, but we'll see what else this trial reveals as it continues on. 

And now it seems like "Directionally very bad" may be the new buzz phrase of the season 😂

videos.title: If You Can’t Do This Your Shoulders Are Screwed
videos.summary_source_text:
If You Can’t Do This Your Shoulders Are Screwed Most people think shoulder pain starts in the shoulder itself.

FREE SHOULDER WORKOUT - https://athleanx.com/bouldershoullders

But in many cases, the real problem is coming from a lack of mobility and control in the shoulder blades.

As a physical therapist who has worked with Major League Baseball pitchers, I can tell you firsthand that the shoulder is only as good as the scapula that supports it. If your shoulder blades can’t move the way they need to, your shoulder joint is going to be forced to compensate. And eventually, that compensation can turn into stiffness, discomfort, and dysfunction.

That’s why this shoulder mobility exercise is so important.

The exercise shown here is called the Angel and Devil. It may look simple, but it is a great beginner on-ramp for improving shoulder blade mobility, shoulder rotation, and overhead range of motion.

The key is to pay attention to the position of the hands. Your hands are a reflection of what is happening inside the shoulder joint. As you move through the exercise, you want to make sure you are rotating through the shoulder and not just swinging the arms around without control.

Perform 8 to 10 reps, just 2 to 3 times per week, and you can start to unlock shoulder mobility, improve scapular movement, and restore range of motion that you may not have had in years.

If your shoulders feel stiff, tight, achy, or restricted, this is one of the best places to start.

And when your shoulders start feeling better and you’re ready to build them up without the aches and pains, go to athleanx.com/bouldershoulders for a free shoulder workout I put together for you.

For more shoulder mobility exercises, shoulder pain fixes, and science-backed training tips, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and subscribe so you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

videos.title: New Footwork Technique That Isn’t Just For McDavid and MacKinnon.
videos.summary_source_text:
New Footwork Technique That Isn’t Just For McDavid and MacKinnon. Hockey footwork has evolved beyond simple crossovers and pivots into something closer to basketball or lacrosse: dynamic, in-place movements that create forward, backward, and lateral options without losing control.

One key example is the stutter, a move that can freeze defenders on the spot. In this breakdown, you’ll see how this technique works, why it gives players more control and deception, and how you can start applying it in your own game.
_______________

videos.title: Don’t Shallow Like This #goldswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text: Don’t Shallow Like This #goldswing #golftips Many golfers know they should shallow the club, but most do it the wrong way—by losing posture, thrusting hips, or rotating too early. The key move is a small shift forward in the downswing while allowing the arms to slide down the body and the hands to drop inside. This simple golf drill will help you make cleaner, more consistent contact and stop coming over the top. Practice this transition move from takeaway to downswing, and you’ll add power and consistency to your swing. Many golfers know they should shallow the club, but most do it the wrong way—by losing posture, thrusting hips, or rotating too early. The key move is a small shift forward in the downswing while allowing the arms to slide down the body and the hands to drop inside. This simple golf drill will help you make cleaner, more consistent contact and stop coming over the top. Practice this transition move from takeaway to downswing, and you’ll add power and consistency to your swing.
videos.summary: Don’t Shallow Like This Many golfers know they should shallow the club, but most do it the wrong way—by losing posture, thrusting hips, or rotating too early. The key move is a small shift forward in the downswing while allowing the arms to slide down the body and the hands to drop inside.

videos.summary_source_text:
One Drop Under Your Tongue, Feel What Happens by Noon | Dr. Mandell What if one simple morning habit could help support your energy, brain clarity, mood, and nervous system before lunchtime? In this video, Dr. Mandell explores the science behind sublingual vitamin B12, why placing it under the tongue may allow for rapid absorption, and how this essential vitamin plays a critical role in red blood cell production, oxygen transport, nerve health, methylation, brain function, and healthy energy metabolism. If you’ve been feeling tired, mentally foggy, low in motivation, or simply not operating at your best, understanding B12 may be a game changer, especially as absorption can decline with age, digestive issues, certain medications, or dietary limitations. Learn who may benefit, how it works physiologically, and why this tiny morning habit may help support how you feel throughout the day.

videos.title: I Went From 243 To 292 Yard Drives… ALL From THIS?!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Went From 243 To 292 Yard Drives… ALL From THIS?! The NEW Titleist GTS Driver Isn’t What Golfers Think... Full Fitting

The NEW 2026 Titleist GTS driver lineup has officially arrived… but after a FULL fitting session at the Titleist Performance Centre at Woburn, the results were NOT what I expected.

In this video, we test the brand new Titleist GTS2, GTS3 and GTS4 drivers to see which model actually performs best and which golfers they REALLY suit.

The new 2026 Titleist driver lineup introduces upgraded ball speed, enhanced forgiveness, refined aerodynamics and new dual weight port technology for greater adjustability than ever before. Introduced on tour in March 2026, the GTS series replaces the hugely successful GT range and features a more forward CG placement in certain models to help lower spin and increase distance.

Using full launch monitor data and going through a complete custom fitting at the incredible Titleist Performance Centre at Woburn, we uncover some surprising results that most golfers won’t expect.

In this video we cover:
• Full launch monitor numbers
• Ball speed, spin and dispersion
• GTS2 vs GTS3 vs GTS4 comparisons
• Which driver suits YOUR swing
• The biggest surprises from the fitting
• Why most golfers may choose the WRONG model

If you’re thinking about upgrading to the new Titleist GTS driver range, this full fitting could completely change your mind.

Bye Bye Berube - Game Notes Episode 101 ft. Andrew Peters On Episode 101 of Game Notes, the guys are joined by former Buffalo Sabres tough guy Andrew Peters. They discuss the firing of Craig Berube in Toronto before diving into the Habs vs Sabres series. Peters provides some insight into what it was like playing for Lindy Ruff. Next, they touch on Avalanche vs Wild and the controversy with Josh Manson before moving to Golden Knights vs Ducks and the controversy with Brayden McNabb. Murls wraps the show up by giving his picks.

videos.title: End 4 swing faults with one fix
videos.summary_source_text:
End 4 swing faults with one fix In this video, Jacob had an issue standing up, flipping a little bit, losing his posture, and that club is releasing early. Now, in this after video, we're going to see him opening up the hips much better, we see him release the club, much more in front. And now he's got a lot more consistency in his swing, a lot better contact when that's happening.

videos.summary_source_text:
Düsseldorfer Helmut De Raaf über die NHL Global Series Germany 2026 Der frühere Torhüter und jetzige Sportliche Leiter der Red Bull Academy Helmut De Raaf im Interview über seine NHL-Verbindungen und die NHL Global Series Germany 2026 in seiner Heimatstadt.

NHL Europe ist den NHL-Fans auf dem ganzen Kontinent gewidmet. Abonniere unseren Kanal für die neueste Eishockey-Action, indem du auf die große, rot leuchtende Schaltfläche ANMELDEN klickst. 

Aktuelle Nachrichten, Spielstände, Statistiken, Analysen und Highlights in Echtzeit: https://www.nhl.com/de 

Mehr Möglichkeiten, sich mit der NHL zu verbinden: 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/nhlde 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/nhl 
Instagram: http://instagram.com/nhleurope

videos.title: Pain Can Leave Movement Patterns Behind
videos.summary_source_text:
Pain Can Leave Movement Patterns Behind Pain does not only affect how you feel — it can also change how you move.
Even after pain improves, protective movement patterns can remain. Over time, those patterns can create new tension, discomfort, or limitation.

In this video, I explore how pain can leave movement patterns behind, and how awareness can begin to change them.
If you’d like to explore this work more deeply, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here:
https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you’d like personal support, you’re welcome to book a one-on-one Zoom call with me here:
https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min

⭐ Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

videos.title: GTS Drivers Reveal Titleist’s Speed Problems
videos.summary_source_text:
GTS Drivers Reveal Titleist’s Speed Problems The new Titleist GTS driver range is here, but is it actually faster, longer and more forgiving…or just another yearly update?

In this video I test the NEW Titleist GTS2, GTS3 and GTS4 drivers both indoors and out on the golf course to see whether the latest Titleist technology genuinely delivers more ball speed, distance and accuracy.

Titleist claims the GTS range combines speed AND forgiveness with breakthrough aerodynamics, redesigned weighting and the new Speed Sync face technology. But does it really outperform previous TSR and TSi drivers? Let's find out...

Video Chapters:

00:00 Introduction
00:35 Looks & Feel
02:11 Titleist GTS Driver New Technology
03:41 Titleist GTS Driver Prices
04:18 Titleist GTS Driver On-Course Test
05:31 How to Hit Better Golf Drives
05:53 Titleist GTS Driver Performance
06:48 My Verdict on GTS

Mark Crossfield takes the GTS drivers through:

- Real on-course testing
- Indoor launch monitor numbers
- Ball speed testing
- Forgiveness testing
- Spin and control comparisons
- Sound and feel analysis
- GTS2 vs GTS3 vs GTS4 differences
- Honest verdict on whether they are worth the money

If you're considering upgrading your driver in 2026, this review will help you decide which Titleist GTS model fits your game best.

videos.title: NEW Titleist GTS 2026 Drivers! - Full Review
videos.summary_source_text:
NEW Titleist GTS 2026 Drivers! - Full Review Rick Shiels gets his hands on the brand new Titleist GTS drivers, the GTS2, GTS3, and GTS4 — and puts them to the ultimate test. Titleist are claiming these are faster than the GT range, but do the numbers back it up? Rick tests all three models on launch monitor, breaking down ball speed, spin rates, and who each driver is actually built for. His honest, independent verdict on whether the GTS lineup is worth your money in 2026.

videos.title: Vi testar nya Titleist GTS – drivern som får tourspelarna att byta direkt!
videos.summary_source_text:
Vi testar nya Titleist GTS – drivern som får tourspelarna att byta direkt! I det här avsnittet av Golfsnack pratar Johan, Daniel och Fanny om Titleist sprillans nya woods – GTS! De går igenom de tre modellerna, testar ljud, känsla och om S:et, som står för både speed och stability, lever upp till vad det utlovar. 
 
"Titleist jobbar ju bara med tourdrivers. De tittar till sina proffs när de ska bygga nya drivers och det proffsen säger är förändra ingenting men gör det bättre. Och det är kanske inte den lättaste uppgiften, men Titleist lyckas med det år efter år", säger Daniel. Spännande! 

Läs mer om Titleist GTS här: https://www.dormy.com/sv/varumarken/titleist/titleist-GTS

videos.title: Claude’s New Integration Is Actually Useful
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude’s New Integration Is Actually Useful ➡️ Share this with someone who would actually use it!

Claude inside Microsoft Office is an AI feature that actually makes a lot or sense.

You can now use Claude directly inside Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook, and it'll remember context across all of the apps.

So for example, you can ask Claude to draft an email in Outlook, jump into Word to turn that email into a proposal, then move into Excel to analyze the numbers behind it. That's an actually useful, real-life scenario where AI can save you a lot of time and make your life easier. 

Honestly one of the more practical AI integrations I’ve seen lately.

#AI #Claude #Anthropic #AInews #ProductivityHacks ➡️ Share this with someone who would actually use it!

Most golfers are learning the game backwards — starting with the driver instead of mastering the short game first. In this video, we break down the classic “hole backwards” approach to golf improvement, the same method old-school pros used for decades to build consistency, confidence, and lower scores.

You’ll learn why putting, chipping, and short game control should come before full swings, plus simple drills to help you improve faster. From making short putts consistently to learning proper alignment and green reading, this video shows beginner golfers and experienced players alike how to practice smarter and build a more complete game from the green to the tee box.

If you want to lower your scores, improve your putting stroke, and develop a better golf practice routine, this video is for you.

Most golfers are learning the game backwards — starting with the driver instead of mastering the short game first. In this video, we break down the classic “hole backwards” approach to golf improvement, the same method old-school pros used for decades to build consistency, confidence, and lower scores.

You’ll learn why putting, chipping, and short game control should come before full swings, plus simple drills to help you improve faster. From making short putts consistently to learning proper alignment and green reading, this video shows beginner golfers and experienced players alike how to practice smarter and build a more complete game from the green to the tee box.

If you want to lower your scores, improve your putting stroke, and develop a better golf practice routine, this video is for you.

videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Collagen Mistake Everyone Makes What does collagen do? Collagen isn’t just about skin health. Discover why collagen is vital for your heart, gut, joints, arteries, and overall health. Find out what collagen deficiency really does to your body and the best ways to improve your intake.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/3P1H1b4

0:14 Collagen is more than skincare 
1:06 Side effects of collagen deficiency
2:20 Collagen and vitamin C
4:00 What causes collagen deficiency?
6:36 Increasing collagen intake 

Watch next to learn how to increase collagen and the benefits of taking it every day:
▶️ https://youtu.be/SHvL0_jvYGs
▶️ https://youtu.be/tmqUqdNmu6s
▶️ https://youtu.be/nUYo0fGfZjM

Although collagen decreases with age, the modern diet is significantly lacking in collagen, especially when compared to the diet of our ancestors.

About 30% of the protein in your body is collagen, yet most people consume very little. Collagen deficiency can impact your bones, heart, gut lining, skin, teeth, gums, and overall health. When collagen is low, your body prioritizes the most essential functions.

Collagen deficiency is largely driven by the modern diet of lean, boneless, skinless meats, along with high sugar intake, chronic stress, and poor sleep.

videos.title: Jenson Button’s First F1 Win | F1 Beyond The Grid Legends
videos.summary_source_text:
Jenson Button’s First F1 Win | F1 Beyond The Grid Legends 20 years ago, Jenson Button added his name to the illustrious list of drivers to win a Formula 1 Grand Prix, when he emerged victorious at Hungary in 2006.

A moment long overdue after multiple podiums, Jenson admits he did get to a point where he thought a win might never happen.

So how did he feel when he finally did cross the finish line and take the chequered flag first?

Speaking to Tom Clarkson, Jenson talks through the race in great detail, before describing the emotions of that huge milestone, how he celebrated and why it changed him as a driver.

Plus, the 2009 World Champion also reflects on when he was at his best in Formula 1, which driver on the current grid he relates to the most and why drivers are more insecure than we might think.

This launch monitor costs £200 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or

videos.title: THREE YEARS OF CHUCK! Carolina Hurricanes Sign Charlie Cerrato to a 3-Year ELC
videos.summary_source_text:
THREE YEARS OF CHUCK! Carolina Hurricanes Sign Charlie Cerrato to a 3-Year ELC The Carolina Hurricanes signed Charlie Cerrato to a 3-year, entry-level contract on Tuesday. What does it mean for both sides, and is it a win-win deal? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Cerrato ELC and what it means for the Hurricanes. How does Cerrato fit into the Hurricanes' system after having two stellar seasons at Penn State? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on what Cerrato can bring to the Chicago Wolves. His two-way style fits the system so well, and he could be an instant impact player moving forward. Finally, Zach concludes the show by looking at the upcoming Canes core that's in Chicago. With Cerrato joining, how good could this core be? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Mercedes’ new S-Class just DESTROYED BMW
videos.summary_source_text:
Mercedes’ new S-Class just DESTROYED BMW Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-13-05

This is the new Mercedes S-Class! 

Rather than being an all-new car, this is more of a mid-life facelift. However, it’s no ordinary facelift, with around 50% of the car having been changed, making it the most extensive mid-life update in Mercedes history! 

The question is, does this new S-Class have what it takes to compete with the Audi A8 & BMW 7 Series? Let’s take a closer look…

Starting with the exterior, there are several large updates, most notably at the front, where there’s a whole new look. The DRLs have been updated to include the 3-pointed star lights, and there’s an all-new grille. However, while it may be all-new, it looks quite plastic and cheap - especially when blacked out in the AMG Line trim. The side profile remains largely the same, and at the back, there are updated (and improved) taillights and a new bumper design. 

However, it’s on the inside where the most notable changes can be found, with the new panoramic Superscreen now sweeping across the entire dash. It encompasses the infotainment screen and a separate screen for the passenger, and it features Mercedes new infotainment system - a marked improvement over the previous iteration! There’s also a new steering wheel (with some physical buttons), and of course, the cabin is covered in soft-touch, high-quality materials. 

In the rear, the seats are as comfortable as ever, especially in the two-seat edition that we have here. There’s a huge centre console with lots of storage, new passenger screens, and the seats fully recline just as they used to. 

The new Mercedes S-Class will cost from £103,000 for the AMG Line Premium trim we have here. However, depending on the engines and trims you choose, this could rise up to around £140,000! 

So is it the must-have luxury limousine, or are you better off going for an Audi or BMW? Stick with Mat to see for yourself! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-13-05

videos.title: Världens BÄSTA burgare kommer till Stockholm! 👑

videos.title: UK | 12th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 12th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: 12.5: OMG, UPL! Luukkonen's CLUTCH return to net leads Sabres to CRUCIAL Game 4 victory 🇫🇮⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
12.5: OMG, UPL! Luukkonen's CLUTCH return to net leads Sabres to CRUCIAL Game 4 victory 🇫🇮⭐ Just when Buffalo needs a return to form, Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen steps up with a MASSIVE performance in Game 4! The Finnish netminder stops 28 of 30 shots the Canadiens fire his way, helping his Sabres escape Montreal with a 3-2 victory to tie the series. Luukkonen's heroic efforts in net earn him both 1st star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: Avalanche Look to Close Out Series on Home Ice. Who Gets the Start in Net?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Look to Close Out Series on Home Ice. Who Gets the Start in Net? Colorado Avalanche eye series-clinching victory on home ice as goaltending debate intensifies. Can the Avs finally close out a playoff series at Ball Arena, or will the Minnesota Wild seize a lifeline? Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s matchup advantages, the aggressive play expected from Minnesota, and the significance of key Wild injuries, including the absences of Eriksson Ek and Brodin.

The heated discussion centers on who should start in net—Scott Wedgewood or Mackenzie Blackwood—with listener insights fueling the debate. Other key topics include Colorado’s penalty kill struggles, special teams’ impact, and Josh Manson’s controversial fine. Plus, Chris MacFarlane’s nomination for GM of the Year sparks analysis of his roster moves compared to rivals Bill Guerin and Pat Verbeek. Will the Avalanche capitalize on their momentum and depth, or can the Wild turn the tide? Don’t miss this pulse-check on Colorado’s playoff quest.

videos.title: PGA Championship picks, Cameron Young’s Dad joins | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA Championship picks, Cameron Young’s Dad joins | The Drop The Drop has all you need in terms of picks and previews for this week’s PGA Championship, the second major of the year. 2-time PGA TOUR winner Matt Every goes through where the top players will finish, what feats are likely to be accomplished and who will ultimately hoist the Wanamaker Trophy on Sunday. We welcome to the show PGA of America professional David Young– who also happens to be the father of Cameron Young, the FedExCup leader and #3 in the Official World Golf Ranking. He talks about his son’s play, what he’s like off the course and what it has been like to watch Cameron rise to the top of his sport. In another edition of Every Tuesday, Ben Griffin visited with Matt Every over a fishing trip at Doral and talked about his career, what he does to prepare for a tournament and a humorous recounting of the time he took too much creatine before a round last year.

videos.title: Proper Puck Protection
videos.summary_source_text:
Proper Puck Protection The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls!
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls! How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls!

In today’s #tourtrucktuesday upload we talk about your responsibilities when it comes to being a great driver of the golf ball.

Yes having a dialed in driver is crucial but so too is how you strategically set up to use that driver and the targets your choose.

I also believe massively in tee height and how that can impact the way you deliver the golf club, all demonstrated within.

Sometimes the perfect launch and spin numbers aren’t a priority, golf is about the lowest score, keep that in mind and adjust your delivery accordingly.

The Trott Shop is open.

Head to La Valle Coastal Club which is the new home for my own tour fitting experience THE TROTT SHOP:

https://thetrott.shop

videos.title: Try This Skating Trick For Faster Acceleration
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Skating Trick For Faster Acceleration Want to learn how to accelerate faster? Forget about swinging your arms harder or pushing with more tension. This is about understanding the game of hockey and adjusting your movement patterns accordingly to match the NHL’s best.

If you’ve ever watched an NHL game or observed players around the rink, you’ve probably noticed that they rarely employ the traditional straight-line sprinting technique. Instead, they utilize a variety of transitional movements like crossunders, corkscrews, punch turns, and pivots. The classic, textbook make a diamond with your blades and take off, rarely happens.

So, what’s the secret to becoming a better accelerator on the ice? Embracing these unique movements and incorporating them into your training. Instead of relying on the forward stride, we encourage you to use crossunders to accelerate as soon as you touch the puck or need to gain open space. Want to learn how to accelerate faster? Forget about swinging your arms harder or pushing with more tension. This is about understanding the game of hockey and adjusting your movement patterns accordingly to match the NHL’s best.

videos.title: 🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert 🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert for the whole family. It's so delicious, I could make it every day!

2 eggs.
1 tbsp stevia powder (no maltodextrin).
1.7 oz (50 g) sugar-free dark chocolate.
1 oz (30 g) butter.
1/4 tsp salt. 1/3 cup (70 g) spelt flour.
1/4 cup (40 g) walnuts.
Bake in a preheated oven at 355°F (180°C) for 15–20 minutes.

If you’re struggling to find the middle of the clubface, this lesson could explain why.
In this session, Michael, a 3-handicap golfer, was hitting poor strikes and even the occasional shank, despite having a pretty solid golf swing. The real issue wasn’t what he thought it was.
We uncovered one key downswing move that was causing his contact problems: early extension. As his lower body moved towards the golf ball, he lost space and exposed the heel of the club, leading to inconsistent strikes.

In the lesson, we walk through:
- why this happens
- how it affects strike location
- two simple drills to create more space
- how to start finding the center of the face more consistently

Once Michael understood the real cause and felt the fix, the change in strike was immediate.
If you’ve got a decent swing but still struggle with clean contact, this is well worth a watch.

videos.title: I Shortened My Backswing… and Everything Changed
videos.summary_source_text:
I Shortened My Backswing… and Everything Changed Unlock the secret to hitting your irons further and more consistently with this simple but powerful drill.

If you’re tired of coming up short with your irons, struggling to find pure contact, or losing distance on approach shots, this drill could completely transform your ball striking. In today’s lesson, Alex Elliott walks you step-by-step through an incredible training move designed to help you:

Gain effortless distance with every iron
Strike the ball first, then the turf
Improve swing consistency and accuracy
Build confidence with your mid and long irons

Whether you’re a beginner looking for more solid contact or a mid-handicap golfer chasing extra distance, these drills are designed to help golfers of all levels hit their irons further and straighter.

Key moments in this video:

00:01 How any why I have shortened my backswing
00:20 How to take this to the golf course
00:32 Backswing feeling compact - Drill 1 
1:32 How to get ball then divot
2:10 How to stop topping the golf ball
2:40 How to practice the feeling on the driving range 
3:03 How to know whether you are doing the drill for your backswing right or wrong
4:00 Backswing and downswing coming together 
5:06 Get in the slot 
5:28 How to take it to the golf course
6:26 How to get ball then turf on the golf course

videos.title: Amateur Golfers Can Skip Bunker Practice
videos.summary_source_text:
Amateur Golfers Can Skip Bunker Practice I created The BX-1 alongside former Nike club designer Josh Boggs, a winner of 12 Golf Digest “Hot List” awards.

Let's go over the Top 8 Reasons Amateur Golfers Can Skip Hundreds of Hours of Bunker Practice with the BX1 Wedge

1. **Reduced Setup Complexity**: With the BX-1, there's no need for the complex setup adjustments required for traditional wedges. Amateurs can avoid the need to practice opening the club face, adjusting stances, and hand positions.

2. **Increased Margin for Error**: The BX-1's design provides a larger margin for error. Unlike traditional wedges where even minor setup mistakes lead to disastrous shots, the BX1 allows for more forgiveness on minor errors, reducing the need for extensive practice to achieve precision.

3. **No Face Opening Required**: Traditional wedge play demands opening the face wide open to achieve the correct bounce. This technique takes time and practice to master. The BX-1 already has a built-in bevel, removing the need to adjust the face.

4. **Avoiding Shanks and Blades**: The BX-1 eliminates the risks of shanking or blading the ball due to its forgiving design, while traditional wedges often lead to these issues unless you've practiced extensively.

5. **Consistent Swing Mechanics**: With the BX-1, there’s no need to change your natural swing. Traditional wedges require you to alter your swing mechanics, making it necessary to invest time in practice to consistently make the adjustments.

6. **Faster Learning Curve**: Amateurs can quickly get out of bunkers with minimal practice by using the BX-1. The wedge is designed to perform like a pro’s open-face shot without demanding the same amount of skill or practice time.

7. **Confidence in the Sand**: With the BX-1, you can build confidence quickly because the club is more forgiving. This contrasts with traditional wedges where lack of confidence and fear of making mistakes lead to prolonged practice sessions.

8. **Normal Shot Setup**: The BX-1 allows for a standard shot setup, similar to a fairway shot, which is straightforward and familiar for most golfers, thereby reducing the necessity for special bunker shot practice.

videos.title: Paddy's DON'TS | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Paddy's DON'TS | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the fourth Paddy’s Golf Tip is called “Paddy’s Don’ts”, or things you shouldn’t do in the golf swing. 
 
In this video I explain why you shouldn’t keep your head down during the swing and why you should avoid keeping your feet still at address and whilst swinging, as well as a number of other “dont’s”!

However, at the same time I also explain what you should do and demonstrate how, in each case.

 #padraigharrington  #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback 

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

About Padraig Harrington: 

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. As a three time major champion, Padraig is one of the world’s top golfers and his playing record speaks for itself. Following a very successful amateur career, including winning the Walker Cup in 1995 at Royal Porthcawl in one of his three appearances, he turned professional in September 1995.

videos.title: Can We Match Rory McIlroy & Nelly Korda’s Driver Numbers in Just 10 Swings?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can We Match Rory McIlroy & Nelly Korda’s Driver Numbers in Just 10 Swings? 🏌️‍♂️ Clubhouse Golf – https://bit.ly/4eBgyeH

10 swings. That’s all we get.

In this video, Eloise and I take on a ridiculous challenge… using the TaylorMade Qi4D Driver to try and match the driver numbers of two of the best drivers in golf: Rory McIlroy and Nelly Korda.

Here’s the twist…

We each start with a driver that is as wrong as possible, and the other person has just 10 swings to fix the setup and get the numbers as close as possible to the Tour data.

That means adjusting:

loft
weighting
shaft feel
and trying to influence the swing to match the numbers

No pressure… just 10 swings to pull it off.

Can we actually get close to Rory and Nelly’s driver data?
Or is this challenge completely impossible?

Let us know in the comments who you think won the challenge!

videos.title: CHANGING NARRATIVES! The Ever-Changing Narrative Surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes
videos.summary_source_text:
CHANGING NARRATIVES! The Ever-Changing Narrative Surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes The Carolina Hurricanes are still getting the "cakewalk" narrative, even after going 8-0 to begin the playoffs. Why don't they ever get the credit they deserve? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes are still not getting the respect they deserve after sweeping the Ottawa Senators and the Philadelphia Flyers. The usual narrative is that the Stanley Cup Playoffs are the hardest to win a championship, but now it's a "cakewalk" for the Hurricanes. If it's a cakewalk, how is no other team (Colorado) not getting those narratives? Secondly, Zach dives into the numbers of how the Senators and Flyers weren't just "bad teams" in the playoffs, despite getting a wildcard and the third metropolitan spot compared to the Western Conference. There needs to be a path narrative and not this ever-changing goalpost moving on the Hurricanes. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes, even with their recent playoff success, seem not to get the credit they deserve or the benefit of the doubt. It seems like the narrative is always the same: "Oh, it's the Hurricanes, who cares?" Why does this narrative need to change? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Pool för 850 000 kr: sälja fonder eller ta lån?
videos.summary_source_text:
Pool för 850 000 kr: sälja fonder eller ta lån? En familj ska bygga pool för 850 000 kr. Banken har godkänt lånet, belåningsgraden ligger under 50 %. Frågan: ska de sälja sina globala indexfonder på ISK för att slippa låna — eller behålla fonderna och ta lånet?

Mitt svar: behåll fonderna, ta lånet. Förväntad avkastning på en bred billig global indexfond är i snitt ~7 % per år över en 10-årsperiod. Det är högre än bolåneräntan. Mellanskillnaden är din — typ precis det som banker gör för att tjäna pengar.

Och nej, jag tycker inte att "den som är satt i skuld är icke fri" gäller alla. Det beror helt på förutsättningarna.

Hur tänker du? Skriv i kommentarerna.

Författat av Jan Bolmeson per publicerat datum. Vi äger själva indexfonder som nämns i videon. Vi är fristående från nämnda bolag och värdepapper; ingen ersättning har utgått om ej annat anges ovan. Vi avser inte följa upp detta innehåll.

Perfect your takeaway and wrist hinge — too much arm rotation is destroying your swing in the first foot. Eric Cogorno's 2 o'clock fix changes everything.

In This Video, You'll Discover:
•Takeaway mastery using the exact model Eric breaks down — hands straight back, club right down the toe line, toe in front of the heel
•Why wrist hinge in the golf swing is one of the two non-negotiable keys to staying on plane early — and how most golfers unknowingly eliminate it
•The two most common golf swing faults in the takeaway (too far inside AND too far outside) and the single fix that works for both
•A simple 2 o'clock visual that immediately corrects the club path in your golf drills practice — no guesswork, instant feedback
•How to use the two-rehearsal, one-hit drill with the Swing Coach app or video to lock in a correct, on-plane takeaway for good
•The 30-day half-swing protocol that Eric Cogorno uses with students to permanently rewire the start of the golf swing
•Why rushing to full swing too fast is the reason most golf lessons and range sessions don't stick — and how to avoid that trap

What separates this from a generic takeaway tip is the precision of the prescription: 20 reps, three times a week, half swings only, for a full 30 days — nothing longer until the pattern is locked in. Eric Cogorno built this protocol around the two root causes he sees in 80% of the golfers he works with: excess arm rotation and insufficient wrist hinge in the golf swing, both of which are addressed simultaneously by the 2 o'clock drill. Use the Swing Coach app or down-the-line video to confirm the shaft is riding the toe line on every rep — that feedback loop is what makes the 30-day commitment actually work.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: UK | 11th May, Monday – Ep 5 | How Automated Trading Systems Generate Consistent Returns
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 11th May, Monday – Ep 5 | How Automated Trading Systems Generate Consistent Returns In Episode 5 of the “RIFT Before You Quit” livestream series, we dive deep into how automated trading systems are designed to generate consistent returns in unpredictable markets — and why successful trading is not about predicting the market.

This advanced educational session explains:

Why markets are probabilistic, not predictable
Why most retail traders fail despite high win rates
How professional systems focus on consistency, execution, and risk management
The difference between manual trading and cycle-based automated trading
How the RIFT Auto Trading Engine uses structured execution and compounding strategies
Why systems outperform emotional trading over time

Key topics covered:
✅ Win Rate vs Profitability Explained
✅ Risk Management & Position Sizing
✅ Probability vs Prediction in Trading
✅ How Cycle-Based Trading Works
✅ Compounding & Reinvestment Strategies
✅ Structured Execution vs Emotional Trading
✅ Why Consistency Beats Random Trading
✅ Capital Preservation & Long-Term Growth
✅ Institutional Trading Principles
✅ How RIFT’s Alpha Flow, Smart Flow & Microflow Operate Together

The session also includes:

Real examples of compounding growth over 180 days
Explanation of the RIFT reinvest feature
How automated systems maintain consistency through multiple trade cycles
Why users often fail even with systems by interrupting the process
The psychology behind successful long-term automated trading

Community Q&A Topics:

Cold wallets vs hot wallets (Ledger, Tangem, etc.)
Why RIFT was created
Alpha Flow risk explanation
Unified flow strategy discussion
Hyperliquid scalability and liquidity
Future RIFT ecosystem developments
Upcoming futures and prediction layer upgrades
Institutional-grade infrastructure insights

Special Announcement:
The livestream also features discussion about participation in the Vietnam Unchained Summit, collaboration with regulators and government officials, self-custody education, blockchain adoption, and upcoming ecosystem developments including future products and integrations.

This episode is designed to help users, leaders, and affiliate marketers better understand the structure, logic, and long-term strategy behind the RIFT automated trading ecosystem. videos.title: Avalanche Respond and Take Command of Series After Huge Game 4 Win in Minnesota
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Respond and Take Command of Series After Huge Game 4 Win in Minnesota Colorado Avalanche seize control of their playoff series with a commanding 5-2 win over the Minnesota Wild, putting themselves one victory away from advancing. Can coach Jared Bednar’s bold goalie decision and the depth scoring from Ross Colton and Parker Kelly help the Avs close out in Denver?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s bounce-back performance, spotlighting key moments such as Josh Manson’s double minor, the ESPN broadcast hiccups, and the outstanding play of Mackenzie Blackwood in net. The hosts analyze Nathan MacKinnon’s physical resilience, penalty-killing adjustments, and the crucial contributions from the Avalanche’s bottom six. With Minnesota on the brink and tensions flaring, will the Avs keep their composure and finish the job at Ball Arena?

The hosts analyze Nathan MacKinnon’s physical resilience, penalty-killing adjustments, and the crucial contributions from the Avalanche’s bottom six. With Minnesota on the brink and tensions flaring, will the Avs keep their composure and finish the job at Ball Arena?

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

videos.title: Struggling With Your 10-2  Try This Drill!
videos.summary_source_text:
Struggling With Your 10-2  Try This Drill! The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: DOUBLE SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Sweep Their Way to the Eastern Conference Final!
videos.summary_source_text:
DOUBLE SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Sweep Their Way to the Eastern Conference Final! The Carolina Hurricanes punched their ticket to the Eastern Conference Final for the second straight playoffs, and third time in four seasons. What stood out in Game 4 and Round 2 as the Hurricanes' stay undefeated through two rounds of the playoffs. On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes punched their ticket to their third Eastern Conference Final in four seasons. Furthermore, Zach discusses how the Canes joined some elite company, going 8-0 through the first two rounds and holding teams to 10 goals through eight games. Secondly, Zach talks about who stood out the most not only in Game 4, but the series as a whole. Who was the series MVP for the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach goes over why the Mark Jankowski extension is a win-win for both sides. What could this mean moving forward? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Grab The Ice For A Harder Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
Grab The Ice For A Harder Shot "Hands out and stay there." 
That's the cue that's quietly killing your shot.
If your top hand stays extended, you're stiff, you're pushing the puck instead of using leverage from the bounce and spring of your muscles and that stick flex everyone's chasing never actually shows up.

Here's the fix, these are the three steps modern NHL goal scorers use:

✅ Use the bounce and spring of your muscles by pulling the puck to the "sweet spot" and releasing using the elastic springs of your muscles.

✅ Keep your blade mostly in place while both hands move toward the net.

✅ When your hands are extended → pull your top hand into your body, chest, and then back to the crevice.

That pull-in is what grabs the ice. That's where the leverage comes from and when leverage is in the sweet spot, the flex happens on its own.

This is core Slingshot Shooting System mechanics which are reverse-engineered from how the world's best shooters generate their power.

🔗 Want the full system? Check out Train 2.0+ for complete access to the Slingshot Shooting System and the Downhill Skating System.
